35221.title: Proposed Mergers Where Efficiencies Are Needed Most Might Be the Least Likely to Deliver Them
35221.zh_title: 最需要效率的拟议合并可能最不可能带来效率
35221.authors: Robert D. Metcalfe, Alexandre B. Sollaci, Chad Syverson
35221.abstract: Mergers are commonly evaluated by weighing their expected market power effects against any efficiency gains they create. The larger the market power effect of a proposed merger, the larger must be any efficiencies for it to raise social welfare. We show selection into merger proposal distorts the observed relationship between market power and efficiency effects. Even if market power and efficiency gains are independent (or even positively correlated) across all potential mergers, they will generally be negatively related among proposed mergers. This is because parties propose to merge only if the merger’s expected profitability exceeds a threshold, so the underlying components of profitability become substitutes in clearing that hurdle. It does not rely on managerial bias, behavioral frictions, or strategic misrepresentation. We demonstrate this negative correlation is present under very general conditions when the two effects are uncorrelated among all mergers. We also characterize conditions where this still holds even in the presence of positive underlying correlations and firms’ uncertainty about their own merger’s profitability. Policies that might raise the selection hurdle for proposed mergers do not alleviate the negative correlation; indeed, they would exacerbate it. Our analysis has direct implications for interpreting empirical merger retrospectives and for evaluating efficiency defenses in antitrust policy.
35221.zh_abstract: 合并通常通过权衡其预期的市场势力效应与所产生的效率收益来评估。拟议合并的市场势力效应越大，其提高社会福利所需的效率就必须越大。我们表明，合并提案的选择扭曲了观察到的市场势力与效率效应之间的关系。即使市场势力与效率收益在所有潜在合并中是独立的（甚至正相关），它们在拟议合并中通常也会呈负相关。这是因为各方只有在合并的预期盈利能力超过阈值时才提议合并，因此盈利能力的潜在组成部分在跨越该门槛时成为替代品。这并不依赖于管理偏见、行为摩擦或策略性误报。我们证明，当这两个效应在所有合并中不相关时，这种负相关在非常一般的条件下存在。我们还描述了即使在存在正的基础相关性以及企业对其自身合并盈利能力存在不确定性的情况下，这种负相关仍然成立的条件。可能提高拟议合并选择门槛的政策并不会缓解这种负相关；实际上，它们会加剧这种负相关。我们的分析对解释实证合并回顾以及评估反垄断政策中的效率抗辩具有直接意义。

35220.title: Trust, Financial Literacy, and Financial Behaviors: Shaping Retirement Security
35220.zh_title: 信任、金融素养与金融行为：塑造退休保障
35220.authors: Maya Haran Rosen, Annamaria Lusardi, Olivia S. Mitchell
35220.abstract: We extend the literature on the importance of trust for financial behaviors by examining trust, financial literacy, and financial behavior related to retirement security. Using the Health and Retirement Study, we show that Trust in Financial Institutions aligns with behaviors supportive of retirement security, while Trust in Government Programs does not. We further document racial/ethnic differences: for White respondents, Trust in Financial Institutions relates positively to retirement outcomes, but not for Blacks or Hispanics. Moreover, Trust in Government Programs among minority households is linked to reduced stockholding and lower wealth accumulation. These findings inform efforts to strengthen retirement security.
35220.zh_abstract: 我们通过考察与退休保障相关的信任、金融素养和金融行为，拓展了关于信任对金融行为重要性的文献。利用健康与退休研究，我们表明对金融机构的信任与支持退休保障的行为一致，而对政府项目的信任则不然。我们进一步记录了种族/族裔差异：对于白人受访者，对金融机构的信任与退休结果正相关，但对黑人或西班牙裔受访者则不然。此外，少数族裔家庭对政府项目的信任与股票持有减少和财富积累降低相关。这些发现为加强退休保障的努力提供了信息。

35219.title: Lands of Opportunity: Differences in the Geography of Wealth and Income Mobility in the United States
35219.zh_title: 机遇之地：美国财富与收入流动性的地理差异
35219.authors: Ariel J. Binder, Max Risch, John L. Voorheis
35219.abstract: We provide new county-level estimates of intergenerational mobility, covering multiple economic concepts: total income, labor income, homeownership, housing wealth, and total wealth. This is possible via small-area estimation techniques and linked survey and administrative data covering millions of U.S. children born between 1978 and 1986. We find that relative mobility in wealth concepts shows less spatial clustering and more spatial variation than relative mobility in income concepts. Many cities and their suburbs exhibit lower relative mobility (i.e. higher intergenerational persistence) in wealth concepts than in income concepts. Next, we show that various local characteristics are associated with some concepts of economic mobility but not with others. For example, we estimate a strong negative association between the local severity of the Great Recession and child income, regardless of parent position in the income distribution. However, the negative association between recession severity and wealth only exists among children from poorer families. We provide a public-use data package to facilitate further research.
35219.zh_abstract: 我们提供了新的县级代际流动性估计，涵盖多个经济概念：总收入、劳动收入、房屋所有权、住房财富和总财富。这通过小区域估计技术以及覆盖数百万1978年至1986年间出生的美国儿童的关联调查和行政数据得以实现。我们发现，财富概念的相对流动性比收入概念的相对流动性表现出更少的空间聚集和更多的空间变异。许多城市及其郊区在财富概念上的相对流动性（即更高的代际持续性）低于收入概念。接下来，我们表明各种地方特征与某些经济流动性概念相关，但与其他概念无关。例如，我们估计大衰退的地方严重程度与儿童收入之间存在强烈的负相关，无论父母在收入分配中的位置如何。然而，衰退严重程度与财富之间的负相关仅存在于来自较贫困家庭的儿童中。我们提供了一个公共使用的数据包以促进进一步研究。

35218.title: California Billionaires: Wealth, Taxes, and Wealth Tax Revenue Estimates
35218.zh_title: 加州亿万富翁：财富、税收与财富税收入估算
35218.authors: Jasper Boll, Emmanuel Saez, Gabriel Zucman
35218.abstract: This paper documents the wealth of California’s billionaires and the taxes they pay. California billionaires’ wealth exceeds $\$2$ trillion today, the equivalent of 50% of California’s GDP. It has grown 144% from 2023 to 2025, fueled by the AI boom. Over the longer run, the real wealth of California’s billionaire class—the 0.0002% richest households—has been multiplied by 30 from 1982 to 2025, while average real family income in California has about doubled. California billionaires pay about 0.2% of their wealth in California income tax ($\$3.2$ billion/year), representing 2.4% of total California income tax revenue on average over 2023-2025. Using Securities and Exchange Commission data from Alphabet, Meta, Oracle, and Nvidia since 2004, we estimate the trajectory of wealth, income, and taxes paid by the top 4 California billionaires—Page, Brin, Zuckerberg, Ellison (through 2020), and Huang (since 2021)—focusing on their business wealth. This group alone holds nearly $\$1$ trillion in business wealth, almost half of total California billionaire wealth. For this group, wealth growth (+322% over 2023-2025) and low taxation (0.04% of wealth in annual California income tax) are more pronounced. The proposed one-off California billionaire tax of 5%, payable over 5 years, is both small relative to California billionaires’ wealth gains and large relative to the taxes they currently pay. We estimate that it could raise about $\$100$ billion, with comparatively minor impacts on income tax revenue. Using empirical estimates of mobility responses to wealth taxation, we find that an annual wealth tax on California billionaires could raise substantial additional revenue even after accounting for income tax losses due to mobility.
35218.zh_abstract: 本文记录了加州亿万富翁的财富及其缴纳的税款。如今，加州亿万富翁的财富超过2万亿美元，相当于加州GDP的50%。受人工智能热潮推动，其财富从2023年到2025年增长了144%。从更长期来看，加州亿万富翁阶层——最富有的0.0002%家庭——的实际财富从1982年到2025年增长了30倍，而加州实际平均家庭收入大约翻了一番。加州亿万富翁缴纳的加州所得税约占其财富的0.2%（每年32亿美元），在2023-2025年间平均占加州所得税总收入的2.4%。利用自2004年以来来自Alphabet、Meta、Oracle和Nvidia的美国证券交易委员会数据，我们估算了前四位加州亿万富翁——佩奇、布林、扎克伯格、埃里森（截至2020年）和黄仁勋（自2021年起）——的财富、收入和缴纳税款的轨迹，重点关注其商业财富。仅这一群体就持有近1万亿美元的商业财富，几乎占加州亿万富翁总财富的一半。对于这一群体，财富增长（2023-2025年间增长322%）和低税率（每年缴纳的加州所得税占财富的0.04%）更为显著。拟议的一次性加州亿万富翁税（税率为5%，分五年缴纳）相对于加州亿万富翁的财富增长而言较小，但相对于他们目前缴纳的税款而言则较大。我们估计，该税可能筹集约1000亿美元，对所得税收入的影响相对较小。利用对财富税流动性反应的实证估计，我们发现，即使在考虑因流动性导致的所得税损失后，对加州亿万富翁征收年度财富税仍可筹集大量额外收入。

35217.title: The Limits of Political Representation: Evidence from India
35217.zh_title: 政治代表性的局限：来自印度的证据
35217.abstract: Political inclusion is widely believed to improve governance, motivating the creation of elected representatives for highly localized constituencies. This paper studies 1.2 million "hyperlocal" representatives across 150,000 local governments in rural India. Exploiting discontinuities that determine the number and identity of these representatives, we assess how expanded representation affects governance outcomes. We find precisely estimated null effects on core functions, including public project management, intermediation in access to benefit programs, alignment of policy with citizen preferences, equity of benefit allocation, and oversight of public finances. These findings highlight the limits of expanding political representation if representative capacity is weak.
35217.zh_abstract: 政治包容被广泛认为能够改善治理，这推动了为高度地方化的选区设立民选代表。本文研究了印度农村15万个地方政府中的120万名“超地方”代表。利用决定这些代表人数和身份的不连续性，我们评估了扩大代表性对治理结果的影响。我们发现，在核心职能方面，包括公共项目管理、福利项目获取的中介服务、政策与公民偏好的一致性、福利分配的公平性以及公共财政监督，均存在精确估计的零效应。这些发现凸显了在代表能力薄弱的情况下扩大政治代表性的局限性。

35216.title: Divergence in Climate Change Communication: LLM-Based Evidence from the IPCC and the Press
35216.zh_title: 气候变化传播中的分歧：基于大语言模型的IPCC与媒体证据
35216.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Franco Mettola La Giglia, Raul A. Sosa
35216.abstract: Public summaries of IPCC climate assessments lean toward the more severe end of the technical evidence. The pattern appears at two stages: the IPCC’s lead authors and member governments produce the Summary for Policymakers (SPM) from the Technical Summary (TS), and newspapers then cover the SPM. We use LLMs to score about 114,000 matched claim pairs from all six Assessment Reports (1990 to 2023) and ten major US and UK outlets. Both stages systematically shift toward the more severe end of the source while staying inside the IPCC’s accepted scientific ranges. The shift comes mainly from emphasizing higher-impact magnitudes within reported ranges, less from uncertainty compression, and almost none from selecting worst-case emissions scenarios. Left- and right-leaning outlets show similar patterns.
35216.zh_abstract: IPCC气候评估的公开摘要倾向于技术证据中更严重的一端。这种模式出现在两个阶段：IPCC的主要作者和成员国政府从技术摘要中生成决策者摘要，随后报纸对决策者摘要进行报道。我们使用大语言模型对所有六次评估报告（1990年至2023年）以及美国与英国十家主要媒体的约11.4万对匹配声明进行评分。两个阶段都系统性地向来源中更严重的一端偏移，同时保持在IPCC认可的科学范围内。这种偏移主要源于在报告范围内强调更高影响幅度，较少来自不确定性压缩，几乎不来自选择最坏情景的排放路径。左倾和右倾媒体表现出相似的模式。

35215.title: Valuing Disaster Prevention: Desert Locust Monitoring and Control
35215.zh_title: 灾害预防的价值评估：沙漠蝗虫监测与控制
35215.authors: Joséphine Gantois, Anouch Missirian, Evelina Linnros, Anna Tompsett, Amir Jina, Gordon C. McCord, Eyal G. Frank
35215.abstract: Monitoring systems for disaster prevention are costly, and measuring benefits is difficult when monitoring effort is endogenous. We provide the first causal estimate of one such system's impact using three decades of desert locust monitoring data. We document conflict-induced interruptions to monitoring in remote breeding areas, reconstruct how infestations spread to populated areas, and show that exposure to locust swarms around birth decreases child height-for-age, increasing stunting risk by over 7 percentage points. Eliminating the locust monitoring system would induce annual losses of US$\$25$ billion, implying a benefit-cost ratio between 160:1 and 680:1 from child nutrition benefits alone.
35215.zh_abstract: 灾害预防监测系统成本高昂，而当监测努力具有内生性时，衡量其效益十分困难。我们利用三十年的沙漠蝗虫监测数据，首次提供了此类系统影响的因果估计。我们记录了冲突导致的偏远繁殖区监测中断，重建了虫害如何蔓延至人口稠密地区，并表明出生前后暴露于蝗虫群会降低儿童年龄别身高，使发育迟缓风险增加超过7个百分点。取消蝗虫监测系统将导致每年250亿美元的损失，仅从儿童营养效益来看，效益成本比就在160:1至680:1之间。
35215.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：I15, O13, Q0, Q5, Q54, Q57

35214.title: The Psychology of Macroeconomic Expectations
35214.zh_title: 宏观经济预期的心理学
35214.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Florencio Lopez-de-Silanes, Simon G. Schröder, Andrei Shleifer, Maarten van Rooij
35214.abstract: We present a model of “animal spirits” in which context and emotions affect macroeconomic beliefs by shaping which experiences people recall to simulate similar future aggregate states. We test this mechanism by priming Dutch National Bank Survey respondents to recall personal financial or health adversities before eliciting inflation and home price expectations. The treatment causes instability in beliefs and reasoning tied to the measured similarity of the primed experiences to different macro states. This similarity structure also accounts for heterogeneity in beliefs and reasoning based on a range of other personal experiences we measure. The model micro founds several features of macroeconomic beliefs, including narratives, and yields a “confidence multiplier”: spending by some agents cues optimistic context for others, raising their spending.
35214.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个“动物精神”模型，其中情境和情绪通过塑造人们回忆哪些经历来模拟相似的未来总体状态，从而影响宏观经济信念。我们通过启动荷兰国家银行调查的受访者回忆个人财务或健康困境，然后引出通胀和房价预期，来检验这一机制。这种处理导致信念和推理的不稳定性，这与被启动经历与不同宏观状态之间测量的相似性相关。这种相似性结构也解释了基于我们测量的其他个人经历在信念和推理上的异质性。该模型为宏观经济信念的若干特征（包括叙事）提供了微观基础，并产生了一个“信心乘数”：部分主体的支出为其他主体提示了乐观情境，从而提高了他们的支出。
35214.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D84, E03, E31, E71

35213.title: Sophisticated Borrowing Constraints and Macroeconomic Dynamics
35213.zh_title: 复杂的借贷约束与宏观经济动态
35213.authors: Al-Mahdi Ebsim, Chen Lian, Yueran Ma, Pablo Ottonello, Diego J. Perez
35213.abstract: In traditional macro-finance models, firms' debt contracts impose hard borrowing constraints, which require indiscriminate reductions of borrowing and investment when adverse shocks tighten these limits, giving rise to financial acceleration. We study the macroeconomic implications of "sophisticated borrowing constraints" akin to financial covenants among large U.S. nonfinancial firms, commonly specified based on firms' debt relative to operating earnings. We model these constraints as debt thresholds that trigger a transfer of control rights to creditors when they are violated, in which case creditors influence firms' decisions to maximize their value instead of cutting credit unconditionally to adhere to fixed ratios. At the micro level, our model is quantitatively consistent with empirical patterns of investment and earnings around covenant violations. At the macro level, sophisticated borrowing constraints do not generate financial acceleration, because constraint tightening and violations do not induce creditors to downscale firms indiscriminately.
35213.zh_abstract: 在传统的宏观金融模型中，企业的债务合同施加了硬性借贷约束，当不利冲击收紧这些限制时，要求不加区分地减少借贷和投资，从而产生金融加速器效应。我们研究了类似于美国大型非金融企业财务契约的“复杂借贷约束”的宏观经济含义，这些约束通常基于企业债务相对于营业利润来设定。我们将这些约束建模为债务阈值，当违反时触发控制权向债权人转移，此时债权人影响企业决策以最大化其价值，而不是无条件地削减信贷以遵守固定比率。在微观层面，我们的模型在数量上与违反契约时投资和盈利的经验模式一致。在宏观层面，复杂的借贷约束不会产生金融加速器效应，因为约束收紧和违反不会导致债权人不加区分地缩减企业规模。

35212.title: Old Space, New Space: A Commercial Revolution in Innovation?
35212.zh_title: 旧太空，新太空：创新的商业革命？
35212.abstract: The emergence of firms like SpaceX and Blue Origin has made space a leading example of how private enterprise drives innovation, marking what many see as a sharp break between Old Space and New Space. Yet little systematic evidence documents when the transition to this new phase of space innovation occurred and which firms drove it. We use patent data to provide this measurement and find that the largest surge in space innovation occurred in the 1990s, coinciding with demand-side market creation, and preceding the entry of high-profile startups after 2005. Throughout this period and since, incumbent aerospace firms account for most of the space-related patenting, with entrants contributing a growing but minority share. The same geographic regions that dominated space innovation during the post-Apollo era remain dominant today. These patterns are consistent with directed technical change: incumbents direct R&D toward policy-created markets accessible from existing capabilities, while entrants bring science-based insights into domains requiring new paradigms. Our findings suggest that New Space is more closely connected to Old Space than prevailing narratives imply, and that government's most consequential role in space innovation may lie in constructing appropriable markets. We make patent data on space-related technologies available for future research.
35212.zh_abstract: 像SpaceX和蓝色起源这样的公司的出现，使太空成为私营企业推动创新的主要例子，标志着许多人认为的旧太空与新太空之间的明显断裂。然而，很少有系统性证据记录向这一新阶段太空创新的过渡何时发生，以及哪些公司推动了这一过渡。我们使用专利数据来提供这一衡量，并发现太空创新的最大激增发生在20世纪90年代，与需求侧市场创造相吻合，并早于2005年后备受瞩目的初创企业的进入。在整个这一时期及之后，老牌航空航天公司占据了大部分与太空相关的专利，新进入者贡献了不断增长但仍是少数的份额。在后阿波罗时代主导太空创新的相同地理区域至今仍占主导地位。这些模式与定向技术变革一致：老牌公司将研发导向政策创造且现有能力可及的市场，而新进入者则将基于科学的见解引入需要新范式的领域。我们的发现表明，新太空与旧太空的联系比主流叙事所暗示的更为紧密，并且政府在太空创新中最具影响力的作用可能在于构建可获取的市场。我们为未来研究提供了与太空技术相关的专利数据。

35211.title: Endogenous Task Bundling, Skills and Automation
35211.zh_title: 内生任务捆绑、技能与自动化
35211.abstract: Empirical measures of AI's wage effect typically hold fixed the bundle of activities a worker is paid for at its pre-AI shape. We argue that this assumption hides much of the action. When automation breaks a job apart, firms decide how to recombine the surviving activities; whether they rebundle them into one broad role or split them into specialist roles changes which surviving skills the labour market actually rewards. A skill that played no role in the pre-AI wage can become the dominant component of the post-AI wage, while a skill that anchored the pre-AI wage can disappear from the schedule. We develop an assignment model in which the priced human bundle is endogenous, and we use it to show that a fixed-bundle wage regression can mis-sign the effect of AI exposure. In general, the omitted-redesign bias has no unconditional sign: it is the residual covariance between exposure and role-specific redesign terms. Under explicit sufficient conditions, exposure-correlated unbundling loads specialist comparative-advantage premia onto the exposure coefficient, while exposure-correlated rebundling loads a different, often opposite, omitted term. The sign must therefore be measured from local post-AI partition changes rather than assumed from exposure alone.
35211.zh_abstract: 关于人工智能工资效应的实证测量通常将工人所获报酬的任务组合固定在其人工智能前的形态。我们认为这一假设掩盖了大部分作用机制。当自动化将一个工作分解时，企业决定如何重新组合幸存的活动；无论它们是将这些活动重新捆绑成一个宽泛的岗位，还是拆分成专业岗位，都会改变劳动力市场实际奖励哪些幸存技能。一个在人工智能前工资中不起作用的技能可能成为人工智能后工资的主导组成部分，而一个在人工智能前工资中起锚定作用的技能可能从工资表中消失。我们开发了一个分配模型，其中定价的人力组合是内生的，并利用该模型表明，固定组合的工资回归可能会错误地指示人工智能暴露的影响。一般而言，遗漏的重新设计偏差没有无条件符号：它是暴露与特定岗位重新设计项之间的残差协方差。在明确的充分条件下，与暴露相关的去捆绑将专业比较优势溢价加载到暴露系数上，而与暴露相关的重新捆绑则加载了一个不同的、通常是相反的遗漏项。因此，必须根据局部的人工智能后岗位划分变化来测量符号，而不是仅根据暴露来假设。

35210.title: Medical Innovation and Racial Health Disparities: Evidence from a Breakthrough Treatment
35210.zh_title: 医学创新与种族健康差异：来自突破性治疗方法的证据
35210.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Kerwin Kofi Charles, Daniel I. Rees
35210.abstract: Whether medical innovation exacerbates or reduces racial health disparities remains an open question. We study surfactant replacement therapy (SRT), a life-saving intervention for premature infants with respiratory disorders. Before its approval by the FDA in 1989, premature Black infants were much less likely than their White counterparts to die from respiratory-related causes. Within a few years of FDA approval, the Black-White gap in respiratory-related neonatal mortality had essentially disappeared. Using 1980-2000 vital statistics data and non-respiratory-related mortality as a counterfactual outcome, we find that both Blacks and Whites benefited from the introduction of SRT, but White neonates experienced larger and more immediate reductions in mortality. We estimate that, by 1993, SRT had reduced respiratory-related mortality among White neonates by 46 percent, compared to 30 percent for Black neonates. These results are not explained by differences in health care access, as proxied by socioeconomic status or distance to the nearest neonatal intensive care unit. We conclude that racial differences in fetal pulmonary maturation, rather than barriers to access, likely drove the uneven impact of SRT on neonatal mortality.
35210.zh_abstract: 医学创新是加剧还是缩小种族健康差异仍是一个悬而未决的问题。我们研究了表面活性剂替代疗法，这是一种针对患有呼吸系统疾病的早产儿的救命干预措施。在1989年获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准之前，早产黑人婴儿因呼吸相关原因死亡的可能性远低于白人婴儿。在FDA批准后的几年内，呼吸相关新生儿死亡率的黑白差距基本消失。利用1980-2000年的人口统计数据，并以非呼吸相关死亡率作为反事实结果，我们发现黑人和白人都受益于表面活性剂替代疗法的引入，但白人新生儿经历了更大且更即时的死亡率下降。我们估计，到1993年，表面活性剂替代疗法使白人新生儿的呼吸相关死亡率降低了46%，而黑人新生儿仅降低了30%。这些结果无法用医疗保健可及性的差异来解释，如社会经济地位或到最近新生儿重症监护病房的距离。我们得出结论，胎儿肺成熟的种族差异，而非获取障碍，可能导致了表面活性剂替代疗法对新生儿死亡率的不均衡影响。
35210.meta: Programs：CH, EH, PR；JEL：I14, I18, J13, J15

35208.title: Estimating the Present Value of R&D Tax Benefits in the United States
35208.zh_title: 估算美国研发税收优惠的现值
35208.authors: Brandon Pecoraro, Nicholas C. Hoffman, Martin Lopez-Daneri, Elena C. Derby, Rachel Moore, Shannon E. Sledz
35208.abstract: Using a panel of confidential corporate tax returns, we provide the first direct estimates of the realized present value of corporate tax benefits from R&D credits and deductions in the United States. Realized tax benefits can deviate from statutory tax benefits because firms in loss status are typically unable to fully utilize credits and deductions to offset current-year taxes and instead must carry these attributes forward. We develop a novel procedure to track the intertemporal firm-level utilization of tax attributes generated by corporate R&D spending, and find that the present value of R&D tax benefits varies substantially with firms’ loss status, age, and size. Old and large firms typically use R&D tax benefits quickly, while young firms – especially those that are small – frequently operate in loss status and use tax attributes more slowly. From 2012–2016, the average firm generated $\$0.41$ in statutory tax benefits per dollar of R&D investment, with a realized present value of $\$0.36$. Young and small firms in a loss position realized only $\$0.23$ per dollar, a 44% decrease relative to the statutory benchmark.
35208.zh_abstract: 利用一组保密的公司纳税申报表面板数据，我们首次直接估算了美国企业因研发税收抵免和扣除而实际获得的税收优惠现值。实际税收优惠可能与法定税收优惠存在偏差，因为处于亏损状态的企业通常无法完全利用抵免和扣除来抵消当年税款，而必须将这些税收属性结转至以后年度。我们开发了一种新颖的方法来追踪企业研发支出所产生的税收属性在时间维度上的企业层面利用情况，并发现研发税收优惠的现值因企业的亏损状态、年龄和规模而存在显著差异。老牌大型企业通常能迅速利用研发税收优惠，而年轻企业——尤其是小型企业——经常处于亏损状态，利用税收属性的速度较慢。从2012年到2016年，平均每投入1美元研发支出，企业产生0.41美元的法定税收优惠，实际现值为0.36美元。处于亏损状态的年轻小型企业每投入1美元仅实现0.23美元的实际优惠，相比法定基准下降了44%。

35207.title: More Paths or More Contrast? A Theory of Experimentation Breadth
35207.zh_title: 更多路径还是更多对比？关于实验广度的理论
35207.abstract: How should an organisation choose the breadth of its experimentation portfolio? Breadth has two distinct margins—the number of paths kept alive, and the degree of contrast among them—and prior research has largely studied them in isolation. We bring them into a single framework and show that they need not move together. Under a fixed experimentation budget, adding paths creates more chances to find a strong direction, but it also dilutes learning across paths and weakens the strongest feasible contrast. When the task is primarily ranking among already-viable alternatives, broader portfolios become more attractive as the budget rises. When paths share common viability uncertainty, and experimental signals track payoff relatedness, however, additional paths partly repeat the same viability test rather than provide independent information. We identify conditions under which testing exactly two sharply contrasting paths is optimal, dominating both a single deep test and broader portfolios. The framework reconciles competing prescriptions—many parallel shots versus a few sharp comparisons—by clarifying when each applies, and shows why empirical measures of breadth should not treat the number of options and their relatedness as separable margins.
35207.zh_abstract: 一个组织应如何选择其实验组合的广度？广度有两个不同的维度——保持存活的路径数量以及这些路径之间的对比程度——而先前的研究大多将它们孤立地研究。我们将它们纳入一个统一的框架，并表明它们不必同步变动。在固定的实验预算下，增加路径创造了更多找到强有力方向的机会，但也稀释了跨路径的学习，并削弱了可行的最强对比。当任务主要是在已有可行方案中进行排序时，随着预算增加，更广泛的组合变得更具吸引力。然而，当路径共享共同的可行性不确定性，且实验信号追踪收益相关性时，额外的路径部分地重复了相同的可行性测试，而非提供独立信息。我们识别出了一些条件，在这些条件下，测试恰好两条形成鲜明对比的路径是最优的，这优于单一的深度测试和更广泛的组合。该框架通过阐明每种策略的适用条件，调和了相互冲突的建议——即“多路并行”与“少数尖锐对比”——并解释了为什么对广度的实证衡量不应将选项数量及其相关性视为可分离的维度。

35206.title: The Cost of Intermediary Market Power for Distressed Borrowers
35206.zh_title: 中介市场势力对困境借款人的成本
35206.authors: Winston Wei Dou, Wei Wang, Wenyu Wang
35206.abstract: Distressed firms need urgent financing to preserve operations and avoid inefficient liquidation, but they borrow in concentrated markets shaped by existing-creditor blocking power and a small group of specialized lenders. We show that these borrowers pay exceptionally high loan spreads even after removing compensation for credit risk, liquidity risk, and non-risk loan-making costs. To quantify and decompose lender market power, we develop and estimate a dynamic game-theoretic model of distressed lending with latent demand heterogeneity, endogenous lender participation, creditor blocking power, and tacit collusion sustained by repeated syndication. Using granular facility-level data on debtor-in-possession (DIP) loans and highly speculative loans, we find that lender market power explains 533 bps of risk-adjusted spreads in the DIP loan market and 300 bps in the highly speculative loan market, including about 140 bps from tacit collusion in each market. Lender market power is therefore a major source of financial distress costs, reducing survival-critical liquidity by 16–20% and thereby worsening asset-value destruction.
35206.zh_abstract: 陷入困境的企业需要紧急融资以维持运营并避免低效清算，但它们在由现有债权人阻挠力量和一小群专业贷款机构塑造的集中市场中借款。我们表明，即使在剔除了信用风险、流动性风险和非风险贷款成本的补偿后，这些借款人仍支付异常高的贷款利差。为了量化并分解贷款机构的市场势力，我们开发并估计了一个动态博弈论模型，该模型包含潜在需求异质性、内生贷款机构参与、债权人阻挠力量以及通过重复银团贷款维持的默契合谋。利用关于占有债务人（DIP）贷款和高投机性贷款的细粒度设施层面数据，我们发现，贷款机构的市场势力解释了DIP贷款市场风险调整利差中的533个基点，以及高投机性贷款市场中的300个基点，其中包括每个市场中约140个基点来自默契合谋。因此，贷款机构的市场势力是财务困境成本的一个主要来源，它将关乎生存的关键流动性减少了16-20%，从而加剧了资产价值的破坏。
35206.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LE；JEL：C11, D43, G12, G18, G2, G21, G23, G28, K21, L13, L4

35205.title: Tatonnement and Price Setting in General Equilibrium
35205.zh_title: 一般均衡中的试探过程和价格设定
35205.abstract: A foundational question in General Equilibrium theory—when is an equilibrium stable?—has remained largely unresolved for over 150 years despite important contributions. This paper proposes a resolution.
35205.zh_abstract: 一般均衡理论中的一个基础性问题——均衡何时是稳定的？——尽管已有重要贡献，但在超过150年的时间里仍未得到根本解决。本文提出了一种解决方案。

35204.title: Flood Risk, Insurance, and Housing in the United States
35204.zh_title: 美国的洪水风险、保险与住房
35204.abstract: Flooding is among the most salient natural hazards facing households in the United States. A large body of evidence has documented a pattern of disproportionate social vulnerability in floodplains. However, little evidence exists on how household-level exposure to flood risk is distributed. We fill this gap by combining parcel-level flood risk with confidential linked survey and administrative data held at the US Census Bureau. Although net migration to Census blocks in floodplains has increased in recent years, there has been essentially no net migration to parcels with flood risk or change in the overall share of households living in floodplains. Income gradients in flood risk are highly non-linear at the household level, with slightly negative income gradients for the bottom 90 percentiles of the income distribution that are dwarfed by disproportionate exposure in the top decile, especially when considering multiple property ownership. This nonlinearity is largely driven by differences in building type and homeownership within narrow income groups. In contrast to the conclusions in the literature using aggregate data, our household-level analysis suggests that households in floodplains are less disadvantaged and increasingly protected from the impacts of flooding, even as a vulnerable subpopulation of low-income, uninsured homeowners remains.
35204.zh_abstract: 洪水是美国家庭面临的最显著的自然灾害之一。大量证据记录了洪泛区中不成比例的社会脆弱性模式。然而，关于家庭层面洪水风险暴露如何分布的证据却很少。我们通过将地块层面的洪水风险与美国人口普查局持有的保密的关联调查和行政数据相结合来填补这一空白。尽管近年来净迁入洪泛区人口普查区块的人数有所增加，但基本上没有净迁入存在洪水风险的地块，且居住在洪泛区的家庭总体比例也没有变化。在家庭层面，洪水风险的收入梯度高度非线性，收入分布底部90个百分位数的收入梯度略微为负，但被收入最高十分位数的过度暴露所掩盖，尤其是在考虑多套房产所有权时。这种非线性主要由狭窄收入群体内建筑类型和房屋所有权的差异驱动。与使用汇总数据的文献结论相反，我们的家庭层面分析表明，洪泛区中的家庭处境不那么不利，并且越来越受到保护免受洪水影响，尽管仍存在一个由低收入、未投保的房主组成的脆弱亚群体。

35203.title: The Geography of Lifecycle Human Capital Accumulation
35203.zh_title: 生命周期人力资本积累的地理分布
35203.abstract: We examine how place shapes the production of human capital across the lifecycle. We ask: do those places that most effectively produce human capital in childhood also have local labor markets that do so in adulthood? We consider the following determinants of wages across place: 1) location-specific wage premiums, 2) adult human capital accumulation due to local labor market exposure, and 3) childhood human capital accumulation. We construct estimates of location wage premiums using AKM-style estimates of movers across US commuting zones and validate these estimates using evidence from plausibly exogenous out-migration from New Orleans in response to Hurricane Katrina. Next, we examine differential earnings trajectories among movers to construct estimates of human capital accumulation due to labor market exposure. We validate these estimates using wage changes of multi-time movers. Finally, we estimate the impact of place on childhood human capital production using age variation in moves during childhood. Crucially, our estimates of location wage premiums and adult human capital accumulation allow us to construct estimates of the causal effect of place during childhood that are not confounded by correlated labor market exposure. Using these estimates, we show there is a tradeoff between those places that most effectively produce human capital in childhood and the local labor markets that do so in adulthood. We find that each 1-rank increase in earnings due to adult labor market exposure trades off with a 0.5 rank decrease in earnings due to the local childhood environment. This pattern is closely linked to city size, as adult human capital accumulation generally increases with city size, while childhood human capital accumulation falls. These divergent trajectories are associated with differences in both the physical structure of cities and the nature of social interaction therein.
35203.zh_abstract: 我们研究了地方如何在整个生命周期中塑造人力资本的生产。我们提出疑问：那些在童年时期最有效地生产人力资本的地方，是否也拥有在成年期做到这一点的本地劳动力市场？我们考虑了工资在各地之间的以下决定因素：1）特定地点的工资溢价，2）因本地劳动力市场暴露而产生的成年期人力资本积累，以及3）童年期人力资本积累。我们利用美国通勤区之间流动人口的AKM风格估计值构建了地点工资溢价的估计值，并利用卡特里娜飓风后新奥尔良居民看似外生的迁出证据验证了这些估计值。接下来，我们考察了流动人口之间不同的收入轨迹，以构建因劳动力市场暴露而产生的人力资本积累估计值。我们利用多次流动人口的工资变化验证了这些估计值。最后，我们利用童年时期迁移的年龄差异来估计地方对童年期人力资本生产的影响。至关重要的是，我们对地点工资溢价和成年期人力资本积累的估计使我们能够构建童年期地方因果效应的估计值，这些估计值不受相关的劳动力市场暴露的混淆影响。利用这些估计值，我们表明，在那些最有效地生产童年期人力资本的地方与那些在成年期做到这一点的本地劳动力市场之间存在一种权衡。我们发现，因成年期劳动力市场暴露导致的收入每增加1个百分位排名，就会与因本地童年期环境导致的收入减少0.5个百分位排名相权衡。这种模式与城市规模密切相关，因为成年期人力资本积累通常随城市规模增加而增加，而童年期人力资本积累则下降。这些不同的轨迹与城市的物理结构以及其中社会互动的性质差异有关。

35202.title: Fiscal Policy and Transition Risk
35202.authors: Stefano Carattini, Garth Heutel, Givi Melkadze, Inès Mourelon
35202.abstract: We study how climate policy can interact with distortionary fiscal policy and potentially lead to transition risk. Using an environmental dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model that features financial frictions and preexisting labor and capital taxes, we simulate a carbon tax and an abatement subsidy under different scenarios for returning carbon tax revenue or financing the subsidy. We find novel policy implications and important differences between the carbon tax and the subsidy. Under both policies, transition dynamics can differ sharply from long-run outcomes. For the carbon tax, transition dynamics depend on both financial frictions and the choice of revenue recycling. For the abatement subsidy, distortionary financing can generate contractionary transition dynamics, because of financial frictions. Macroprudential policy can mitigate transition risk under the carbon tax but has little effect under the subsidy.
35202.zh_abstract: 我们研究了气候政策如何与扭曲性财政政策相互作用，并可能引发转型风险。利用一个包含金融摩擦和预先存在的劳动与资本税的环境动态随机一般均衡模型，我们在不同的碳税收入返还或补贴融资情景下模拟了碳税和减排补贴。我们发现了新颖的政策含义以及碳税与补贴之间的重要差异。在这两种政策下，转型动态可能与长期结果存在显著差异。对于碳税而言，转型动态既取决于金融摩擦，也取决于收入循环利用方式的选择。对于减排补贴而言，由于金融摩擦，扭曲性融资可能产生收缩性的转型动态。宏观审慎政策可以在碳税下缓解转型风险，但在补贴下效果甚微。

35201.title: Intertemporal Arbitrage and Optimal Operation of Pumped Hydro Energy Storage
35201.zh_title: 抽水蓄能的时间套利与最优运营
35201.abstract: Hydropower is a renewable and flexible energy source that provides essential storage capacity and enhances grid stability. Among storage technologies, pumped hydro energy storage (PHES) remains the most cost-effective solution for long-duration energy storage and plays a key role in power systems with increasing penetration of variable renewable energy. As electricity prices become more relevant under the energy transition, understanding the optimal operation and valuation of PHES assets is increasingly important from a financial perspective. This paper develops a market-based framework that models a PHES facility as a profit-maximizing asset operating in liberalized electricity markets. Using an optimal control approach calibrated with real life technical and operational parameters of the La Muela pumped storage plant and observed electricity prices from the Spanish wholesale market, the model derives an economically intuitive trigger (switching) price governing optimal pumping and generation decisions while accounting for reservoir water inventory dynamics and electricity price uncertainty. The results show that inventory dynamics and electricity price seasonality are central to PHES valuation and optimal operation.
35201.zh_abstract: 水电是一种可再生且灵活的能源，可提供必要的储能容量并增强电网稳定性。在储能技术中，抽水蓄能（PHES）仍然是长时储能最具成本效益的解决方案，并在可再生能源渗透率日益提高的电力系统中发挥关键作用。随着能源转型下电价变得愈发重要，从金融角度理解PHES资产的最优运营和估值也日益关键。本文构建了一个基于市场的框架，将PHES设施建模为在自由化电力市场中追求利润最大化的资产。通过使用基于La Muela抽水蓄能电站真实技术和运营参数校准的最优控制方法，并结合西班牙批发市场的观测电价，该模型推导出一个经济直觉上合理的触发（切换）价格，该价格在考虑水库水量动态和电价不确定性的同时，支配最优抽水和发电决策。结果表明，水量动态和电价季节性对PHES估值和最优运营至关重要。

35200.title: Credibility and Precommitment in Socialist Constitutionalism
35200.zh_title: 社会主义宪政中的可信度与预先承诺
35200.abstract: In this paper I examine Chile’s 1972 initiative to draft a new constitution under President Salvador Allende. I analyze the political and economic circumstances that gave rise to the project and the institutional mechanisms through which the draft sought to advance a socialist economic and political program centered on state ownership of means of production and central planning. I compare the Chilean proposal with the socialist constitutions of the German Democratic Republic and Czechoslovakia. The draft, which was never submitted to a plebiscite, as Allende envisioned, subsequently disappeared and remained unavailable for nearly two decades. Remarkably, the proposal has attracted very limited scholarly attention.
35200.zh_abstract: 本文考察了智利1972年在萨尔瓦多·阿连德总统领导下起草新宪法的倡议。我分析了该项目产生的政治和经济背景，以及该草案试图通过以生产资料公有制和中央计划为核心的社会主义经济和政治计划来推进的制度机制。我将智利的提案与德意志民主共和国和捷克斯洛伐克的社会主义宪法进行了比较。该草案从未像阿连德设想的那样提交全民公决，随后便消失无踪，近二十年无法获取。值得注意的是，该提案吸引的学术关注非常有限。

35253.title: The Sisyphean Pursuit of Evidence for Poverty Traps
35253.zh_title: 为贫困陷阱寻找证据的西西弗斯式追求
35253.authors: Dean Karlan, Amol Singh Raswan, Christopher R. Udry
35253.abstract: Much of development economics, both micro and macro, posits theories and explores the empirics of poverty traps. A common theory centers around asset-threshold poverty traps in which marginal returns to capital increase sharply over a certain threshold and financial markets are incomplete. This combination leads households above this threshold to prosper while those below continuously fall back, trapped in poverty. Yet in economics, as best as we can tell, far more papers assume such thresholds than empirically demonstrate them. In a key recent exception, Balboni et al. (2022) (hereinafter “BBBGH”) argues that data from Bangladesh identifies clear evidence of such a threshold at slightly above the cost of a cow for recent recipients of a big push transfer program. We apply this analysis to data from seven other similar programs in low-income countries and find no evidence of an asset-threshold poverty trap. We then return to BBBGH and argue that their data do not support the identification of a poverty trap, with the point of disagreement being a log-transformation challenge and a potential geographic confound. In long-term representative rural panel data from Bangladesh and Ghana we find no evidence of divergence away from any particular threshold. While the threshold theory is undoubtedly true for some households, we argue that the pursuit of clear evidence of an asset-threshold poverty trap for a broad population is likely an aspirational goal rendered unachievable by the intersection of a multitude of possible mechanisms as well as heterogeneous agents.
35253.zh_abstract: 发展经济学的大部分研究，无论是微观还是宏观，都提出了贫困陷阱的理论并探索其经验证据。一个常见的理论围绕资产阈值贫困陷阱展开，在该陷阱中，资本的边际回报在超过某个阈值后急剧增加，且金融市场不完善。这种组合导致高于此阈值的家庭繁荣，而低于此阈值的家庭则持续倒退，陷入贫困陷阱。然而，在经济学中，据我们所知，假设存在此类阈值的论文远多于经验证明其存在的论文。在最近一个关键例外中，Balboni等人 (2022)（以下简称“BBBGH”）认为，来自孟加拉国的数据为近期接受大推动转移支付项目的受助者识别出了略高于一头牛成本的明确阈值证据。我们将此分析应用于低收入国家其他七个类似项目的数据，并未发现资产阈值贫困陷阱的证据。然后，我们回到BBBGH，认为他们的数据并不支持贫困陷阱的识别，分歧点在于对数转换挑战和潜在的地理混杂因素。在来自孟加拉国和加纳的长期代表性农村面板数据中，我们没有发现偏离任何特定阈值的分化证据。虽然阈值理论对某些家庭无疑是正确的，但我们认为，为广泛人群寻找资产阈值贫困陷阱的明确证据很可能是一个因多种可能机制与异质性主体的交织而无法实现的理想目标。

35252.title: Distribution Costs
35252.abstract: We provide the first direct estimates of distribution expenses incurred by manufacturing plants and quantify their importance for aggregate consumption and measured misallocation. Using a novel measure from the Indian Annual Survey of Industries, we document three facts: distribution expenses amount to over half of labor costs, are over three times larger as a share of sales for plants in the largest decile relative to the smallest, and declined by one third from 2000 to 2010. We develop a model of heterogeneous manufacturing firms that rely on distribution services to sell across space. The improvements in distribution over that time period raised manufacturing consumption by 24.5%. The gains materialize quickly, but unevenly: large firms expand while many small local firms shrink or exit. Distribution costs also matter for measured misallocation: standard TFPR measures generate spurious dispersion and a positive relationship with size. In the ASI, accounting for distribution costs lowers measured TFPR dispersion by 5.1% and the elasticity of TFPR with respect to plant size by 7.0%.
35252.zh_abstract: 我们提供了制造业工厂所产生分销费用的首次直接估计，并量化了其对总消费和测算资源错配的重要性。利用来自印度年度工业调查的一个新颖指标，我们记录了三个事实：分销费用超过劳动力成本的一半；对于最大十分位数的工厂，其占销售额的比例是最小十分位数工厂的三倍以上；并且从2000年到2010年下降了三分之一。我们建立了一个异质性制造业企业的模型，这些企业依赖分销服务在空间上进行销售。在此期间分销的改善使制造业消费提高了24.5%。这些收益迅速实现，但并不均衡：大型企业扩张，而许多小型本地企业收缩或退出。分销成本对测算的资源错配也很重要：标准的TFPR指标会产生虚假的离散度以及与规模的正相关关系。在ASI中，考虑分销成本后，测算的TFPR离散度降低了5.1%，TFPR相对于工厂规模的弹性降低了7.0%。

35251.title: The Word Is Not Enough: Testing the Effects of Information Treatments on Perceived Corruption in Ukraine
35251.zh_title: 仅凭言语是不够的：检验信息干预对乌克兰腐败感知的影响
35251.authors: Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Ilona Sologoub, Yuriy Fedyk
35251.abstract: Using a representative sample of more than 7,000 Ukrainians, we study how information treatments affect corruption perceptions and prosocial behavior. We document a large gap between perceived and experienced corruption: while most respondents view corruption as widespread and a major national problem, far fewer report direct exposure. Through a randomized controlled trial, we find that informing citizens about successful prosecutions raises perceived government willingness to fight corruption but does not reduce overall corruption perceptions. Communicating the scale of corruption alone generates no significant effects. Information treatments have little effect on hypothetical or actual donations and volunteering, suggesting a limited pass-through from changed beliefs to prosocial action. Thus, while information interventions can strengthen institutional credibility, they alone are not enough to tangibly improve civic engagement or reduce perceptions of corruption.
35251.zh_abstract: 利用一个超过7000名乌克兰人的代表性样本，我们研究了信息干预如何影响腐败感知和亲社会行为。我们记录了感知腐败与经历腐败之间的巨大差距：虽然大多数受访者认为腐败普遍存在且是一个重大的国家问题，但报告直接接触腐败的人数要少得多。通过一项随机对照试验，我们发现，告知公民成功起诉的信息会提高人们对政府打击腐败意愿的感知，但不会降低整体的腐败感知。仅传达腐败规模的信息不会产生显著效果。信息干预对假设性或实际的捐赠和志愿服务几乎没有影响，这表明从信念改变到亲社会行为的传导有限。因此，虽然信息干预可以增强制度可信度，但仅凭它们本身并不足以切实改善公民参与或减少腐败感知。

35250.title: Nonresponse Imputations and Related Measurement Issues in the CPI for Shelter
35250.zh_title: 住房CPI中的无应答插补及相关测量问题
35250.authors: Lara Loewenstein, Hugh G. Montag, Randal Verbrugge
35250.abstract: Shelter is the largest component of US consumer price index (CPI) inflation; therefore, the accuracy of shelter inflation is critical for the accuracy of overall CPI inflation. Nonresponse in the BLS Housing Survey, which underpins the measurement of CPI shelter inflation, has increased since 2000 and now represents roughly 40 percent of total observations. Missing rent data are currently imputed using a class-mean approach based on rent tier, potentially resulting in biased imputations, as we find that nonresponse is correlated with factors beyond rent tier. We study alternative simple imputation methods based on variables correlated with both nonresponse and rent growth, including structure type and tenure length. A simple model demonstrates that alternative methods could yield sharply different index biases. However, in practice, we find that these alternative methods yield similar shelter inflation indexes, suggesting that any index bias may be modest.
35250.zh_abstract: 住房是美国消费者价格指数通胀的最大组成部分；因此，住房通胀的准确性对于整体CPI通胀的准确性至关重要。支撑CPI住房通胀测量的BLS住房调查中的无应答率自2000年以来有所上升，目前约占总观测值的40%。缺失的租金数据目前使用基于租金等级的类均值方法进行插补，这可能导致有偏的插补，因为我们发现无应答与租金等级以外的因素相关。我们研究了基于与无应答和租金增长均相关的变量（包括建筑类型和租住时长）的替代简单插补方法。一个简单模型表明，替代方法可能产生截然不同的指数偏差。然而，在实践中，我们发现这些替代方法产生了相似的住房通胀指数，这表明任何指数偏差可能都是适度的。

35249.title: The Price of Protection: Tariff Incidence and Import Collapse under the Infamous Smoot-Hawley Tariff
35249.zh_title: 保护的价格：臭名昭著的斯穆特-霍利关税下的关税归宿与进口崩溃
35249.abstract: Using newly digitized monthly data on the quantities and prices of imports as well as product-level data on tariff rates, we estimate that in the first year after the passage of the Smoot-Hawley Tariff Act, imports facing rate increases fell swiftly and dramatically relative to imports not affected by tariffs: for a one-percentage-point increase in the tariff rate, they declined by an average of 4%. We also estimate that the incidence of Smoot-Hawley was almost entirely borne by U.S. importers. Using an open-economy model, we attribute our high measured short-run trade elasticity of greater than 4 to fixed exchange rates that the U.S. maintained with most trade partners in the first 15 months after enactment. Our model also suggests that Smoot-Hawley accounted for 27% of the decline in total US imports in the first year after enactment. Finally, we construct both partial equilibrium and general equilibrium welfare estimates of Smoot-Hawley. Both methods deliver welfare losses of about 0.2% of GDP, reflecting the high measured elasticity of substitution and low US import-GDP ratio.
35249.zh_abstract: 利用新数字化的月度进口数量和价格数据以及产品层面的关税率数据，我们估计，在《斯穆特-霍利关税法》通过后的第一年，面临税率提高的进口相对于未受关税影响的进口迅速且显著下降：关税率每提高一个百分点，进口平均下降4%。我们还估计，斯穆特-霍利关税的负担几乎完全由美国进口商承担。通过一个开放经济模型，我们将测量到的高于4的短期贸易弹性归因于美国在法案实施后前15个月与大多数贸易伙伴维持的固定汇率。我们的模型还表明，斯穆特-霍利关税占法案实施后第一年美国总进口下降的27%。最后，我们构建了斯穆特-霍利关税的局部均衡和一般均衡福利估计。两种方法均得出约0.2% GDP的福利损失，这反映了测量到的高替代弹性和美国较低的进口-GDP比率。
35249.meta: Programs：DAE, ITI；JEL：F10, F13, F14, F63, F68, N12, N72

35248.title: Electoral Incentives and Government Transparency: Evidence from Freedom of Information Requests
35248.zh_title: 选举激励与政府透明度：来自信息自由请求的证据
35248.authors: Raymond Fisman, Aron Malatinszky, Eyub Yegen
35248.abstract: Transparency is a basic requirement of government accountability, allowing citizens to access the information necessary to monitor, reward, and punish politicians and bureaucrats. Yet transparency inevitably involves discretion by the same government that is being evaluated. In this paper, we show that reelection incentives affect transparency, by comparing the responsiveness of freedom-of-information requests made via the online platform MuckRock just before state and municipal elections to those filed elsewhere at the same time. Since identical requests are often made simultaneously to many agencies across the U.S., we may assess whether an agency rejects a request while holding constant the timing, submitter, and request content, varying only whether the request is filed shortly before an election. We first document that FOIA rejection rates are positively correlated with a standard measure of state-level corruption. Our main analyses then show that rejections and delays of FOIA requests in state and municipal agencies are higher ahead of (state and city) elections in high-corruption settings. Overall, our results suggest that discretion may be used to limit access to information relevant to political accountability.
35248.zh_abstract: 透明度是政府问责制的基本要求，使公民能够获取监督、奖励和惩罚政治家及官僚所需的信息。然而，透明度不可避免地涉及被评估政府自身的自由裁量权。在本文中，我们通过比较在州和地方选举前夕通过在线平台MuckRock提交的信息自由请求与同时期在其他地方提交的请求的响应率，表明连任激励会影响透明度。由于相同的请求通常同时提交给美国各地的许多机构，我们可以评估一个机构是否拒绝请求，同时控制时间、提交者和请求内容，仅变化请求是否在选举前不久提交。我们首先记录了FOIA拒绝率与州级腐败的标准衡量指标呈正相关。我们的主要分析随后表明，在高腐败环境中，州和市政机构在（州和市）选举前对FOIA请求的拒绝和延迟更高。总体而言，我们的结果表明，自由裁量权可能被用来限制获取与政治问责相关的信息。

35247.title: Scaling Point-in-Time Language Models
35247.authors: Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud, Johannes Schwab, Teng Andrea Xu
35247.abstract: Large language models trained on unrestricted internet corpora inevitably embed information from the future, introducing lookahead bias that compromises the validity of backtests and causal inference in finance and the social sciences. Point-in-time language models—trained exclusively on text available up to each calendar date—eliminate this leakage by construction, but existing efforts typically produce models that lag substantially behind their unconstrained counterparts. We show that this performance gap can be narrowed through scale. Training decoder-only transformers with up to 4 billion parameters on 1 trillion chronologically filtered tokens from FineWeb, we construct a sequence of monthly model checkpoints spanning 2013–2024. Across a range of common-sense reasoning and language understanding benchmarks, our models approach the performance of leading open-weight models of comparable size (such as Gemma-3-4B and LLaMA-7B) trained on temporally unrestricted data, although a performance gap remains on several tasks. Finally, in a strict out-of-sample economic evaluation task, portfolios built from point-in-time embeddings achieve robust positive Sharpe ratios and perform close to full-sample counterparts that violate temporal validity, indicating that chronologically consistent language models can extract economically meaningful signals without relying on look-ahead bias. We release the complete pipeline—including dataset construction, training infrastructure, and evaluation code—to enable reproducible point-in-time language modeling and to support research applications that require strict temporal validity.
35247.zh_abstract: 在不受限制的互联网语料库上训练的大型语言模型不可避免地嵌入了未来的信息，引入了前瞻性偏差，损害了金融和社会科学中回测和因果推断的有效性。时点语言模型——仅使用截至每个日历日期可用的文本进行训练——通过构造消除了这种信息泄漏，但现有的努力通常产生的模型性能明显落后于其不受限制的对应模型。我们表明，这种性能差距可以通过规模扩展来缩小。通过在来自FineWeb的1万亿个按时间顺序过滤的令牌上训练参数多达40亿的解码器专用Transformer，我们构建了一个跨越2013-2024年的月度模型检查点序列。在一系列常识推理和语言理解基准测试中，我们的模型接近在时间上不受限制的数据上训练的同等规模领先开源模型（如Gemma-3-4B和LLaMA-7B）的性能，尽管在若干任务上仍存在性能差距。最后，在一个严格的样本外经济评估任务中，基于时点嵌入构建的投资组合实现了稳健的正夏普比率，并且表现接近违反时间有效性的全样本对应组合，这表明时间一致的语言模型可以在不依赖前瞻性偏差的情况下提取具有经济意义的信号。我们发布了完整的流程——包括数据集构建、训练基础设施和评估代码——以实现可复现的时点语言建模，并支持需要严格时间有效性的研究应用。

35246.title: Complex Modern Portfolio Theory
35246.zh_title: 复杂现代投资组合理论
35246.authors: Oliver Hellum, Theis I. Jensen, Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud
35246.abstract: The literature has long wrestled with the practical usefulness of Modern Portfolio Theory (MPT), and extensive evidence shows its performance decreases rapidly with the number of assets (N ). We present several new and counterintuitive facts about MPT. Most importantly, the performance of MPT in fact increases with N once the number of assets exceeds the number of training observations (T ). This finding holds in a variety of settings: in conjunction with popular portfolio regularization methods, in a variety of asset universes, and when T is large or small.
35246.zh_abstract: 文献长期以来一直在探讨现代投资组合理论（MPT）的实际有用性，大量证据表明其性能随着资产数量（N）的增加而迅速下降。我们提出了关于MPT的几个新的且反直觉的事实。最重要的是，一旦资产数量超过训练观测值数量（T），MPT的性能实际上会随着N的增加而提高。这一发现在多种设置下成立：结合流行的投资组合正则化方法、在各种资产类别中，以及当T较大或较小时。

35245.title: How Much Has Shale Gas Saved U.S. Consumers?
35245.zh_title: 页岩气为美国消费者节省了多少钱？
35245.abstract: It may seem like a distant memory now, but as of the mid-2000s, U.S. natural gas production had been flat for a decade, and the U.S. was importing liquefied natural gas (LNG), with plans to import much more. Then shale gas happened. Advances in hydraulic fracturing and horizontal drilling caused U.S. natural gas production to increase significantly, and the U.S. went from being a net importer of natural gas to being the world's largest exporter. This paper calculates how much shale gas has saved U.S. natural gas consumers. Using price differences between the United States, Europe and Japan, we calculate that U.S. natural gas consumers have saved $\$3.1$-$\$4.3$ trillion between 2007 and 2025, equivalent to $\$164$-$\$227$ billion annually. Access to low-price U.S. natural gas has been particularly valuable during major supply shocks such as the war in Ukraine, and the benefits of shale gas have been experienced broadly across sectors and states.
35245.zh_abstract: 现在可能已是遥远的记忆，但截至2000年代中期，美国天然气产量已停滞十年，美国正在进口液化天然气（LNG），并计划进口更多。随后页岩气出现了。水力压裂和水平钻井技术的进步使美国天然气产量大幅增加，美国从天然气净进口国转变为全球最大的出口国。本文计算了页岩气为美国天然气消费者节省了多少钱。利用美国、欧洲和日本之间的价格差异，我们计算出美国天然气消费者在2007年至2025年间节省了3.1-4.3万亿美元，相当于每年1640-2270亿美元。在乌克兰战争等重大供应冲击期间，获得低价美国天然气的机会尤其宝贵，页岩气的好处已广泛惠及各个行业和州。

35244.title: Will The University Endowment Tax Slow Scientific Progress? Evidence from Elite Economics PhD Programs
35244.zh_title: 大学捐赠税会减缓科学进步吗？来自精英经济学博士项目的证据
35244.authors: Joshua Angrist, Marc Diederichs, Glenn Ellison
35244.abstract: The 2025 university endowment tax hike and other sources of financial pressure may lead the schools that train the most prolific economics researchers to reduce graduate enrollment. Will this affect long-run research output? We use a novel sample of MIT Economics PhD program applicants to estimate the research value-added of eight elite schools. Our estimates mitigate selection bias by controlling for MIT admissions committee rankings—a remarkably strong predictor of long-run research success—and for applicant aspirations as revealed by their application portfolios. While rank controls substantially reduce estimated gaps between elite and non-elite graduates, large differences in value-added remain. Graduates of high-tax and other top-eight schools produce 60-75% more impact-adjusted publications than do comparable graduates from non-top-eight US schools. The elite-school advantage is especially pronounced for top five journal publications. Differences in research success within the elite tier, however, are relatively modest. The out-performance of elite-school PhDs does not appear to be explained by editorial connections or peer effects in elite programs.
35244.zh_abstract: 2025年大学捐赠税上调及其他财务压力来源可能导致培养最多产经济学研究人员的学校减少研究生招生。这是否会影响长期研究产出？我们使用麻省理工学院经济学博士项目申请人的一个新样本，来估计八所精英学校的研究增值。我们的估计通过控制麻省理工学院招生委员会排名——这是长期研究成功的一个非常强的预测指标——以及通过申请人申请组合揭示的申请人志向，来减轻选择偏差。虽然排名控制显著缩小了精英与非精英毕业生之间的估计差距，但增值方面仍存在巨大差异。高税收及其他顶尖八所学校的毕业生比来自美国非顶尖八所学校的可比毕业生多产出60-75%的影响调整后出版物。精英学校的优势在五大顶级期刊发表方面尤为显著。然而，精英层级内部研究成功的差异相对较小。精英学校博士的优异表现似乎不能用精英项目中的编辑关系或同伴效应来解释。

35243.title: A Tale of Two Market Returns: The Broad Market Factor and The Idiosyncratic Financial Factor
35243.zh_title: 两种市场回报的故事：广泛市场因子与特质金融因子
35243.authors: Sung Je Byun, Johnathan Loudis, Lawrence D.W. Schmidt
35243.abstract: We construct a Broad Market Factor (BMF), which is a proxy for the value-weighted equity return on all firms in the US economy (public and private). The BMF differs from the standard Value-weighted Market Factor (VMF), which reflects the value-weighted equity return on public firms. We define the difference between the VMF and the BMF to be the Idiosyncratic Financial Factor (IFF). The IFF carries no risk premium and is uncorrelated with all macroeconomic proxies for investor marginal utility we consider. CAPM betas and, consequently, discount rates are underestimated when measured with respect to the VMF compared to the BMF for most portfolios. Size factors become redundant and the size anomaly is resolved when the VMF is replaced by the BMF in standard factor models. The intertemporal risk-return relation is substantially stronger when one replaces the VMF with the BMF. The unifying explanation for these results is that the IFF adds unpriced risk to the VMF, distorting both cross-sectional and time-series estimates of exposure to priced market risk.
35243.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个广泛市场因子（BMF），它是美国经济中所有公司（上市和私营）价值加权股权回报的代理变量。BMF不同于标准的价值加权市场因子（VMF），后者反映的是上市公司的价值加权股权回报。我们将VMF与BMF之间的差异定义为特质金融因子（IFF）。IFF不承担风险溢价，并且与我们考虑的所有投资者边际效用的宏观经济代理变量均不相关。对于大多数投资组合，相对于BMF，使用VMF测量的CAPM贝塔值以及相应的贴现率被低估。当在标准因子模型中将VMF替换为BMF时，规模因子变得冗余，规模异象得以解决。当用BMF替换VMF时，跨期风险-回报关系显著增强。这些结果的统一解释是，IFF向VMF添加了未定价的风险，从而扭曲了对定价市场风险暴露的横截面和时间序列估计。

35242.title: Comparative Advantage and Openness under Global Fragmentation: Lessons from the Past 65 Years
35242.zh_title: 全球碎片化下的比较优势与开放：过去65年的教训
35242.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Hiro Ito, Jamel Saadaoui
35242.abstract: This paper asks why openness has been such a strong catalyst for catch-up growth in some regions or countries, while in others openness has been followed by stalled convergence, divergence, or stagnation. We conclude that “openness” in today’s geoeconomically fragmented world is much more than trade intensity or trade integration. Positioning in trade networks, trade fundamentals, human capital, institutional capacity and stability matters for the potential for trade-induced productivity gains. We explore the global heterogeneity across continents between 1960 and 2024, unbalanced panel of up to 145 economies per year and estimate a growth equation using a dynamic approach for countries and years. We build a baseline equation relating real GDP growth to lagged income and growth. We complement the traditional drivers of growth by contorting for positionings variables the world economy: a proxy for economic integration measuring the number of regional trade arrangements ratified by each economy, a commodity dependence indicator; metrics related to export networks geoeconomic vulnerability (GeoV). measure country’s export position with geopolitically distant partnerships; geoeconomic connectivity (GeoC) measuring the degree that trade relationships are across greater spectrum of geopolitics. The GeoC measures external “connectors” positioning that may counterbalance costs of geoeconomic fragmentation by securing access to greeter variety of markets and resources. Notably, the Geoeconomic linkages add an important element of “positioning,” indicating that the more “geopolitically” connected is a country, the greater are the investment-growth links. A greater diverse positioning of countries’ economies improves their capacity to transform investment into output in a more diversified setting. This also indicate a lesser dependent growth on “momentum” by countries’ economy, pointing to a greater shock-absorption capacity, confirming the benefits of diversified structure for growth from investments facing pressures from fragmentation.
35242.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了为什么开放一直是某些地区或国家追赶增长的强大催化剂，而在其他地区，开放之后却出现了趋同停滞、分化或停滞。我们得出结论，在当今地缘经济碎片化的世界中，“开放”远不止是贸易强度或贸易一体化。在贸易网络中的定位、贸易基本面、人力资本、制度能力和稳定性对于贸易驱动生产率增长的潜力至关重要。我们探讨了1960年至2024年间各大洲的全球异质性，使用了每年最多145个经济体的非平衡面板数据，并采用动态方法估计了国家和年份的增长方程。我们构建了一个将实际GDP增长与滞后收入和增长联系起来的基线方程。我们通过引入世界经济中的定位变量来补充传统的增长驱动因素：衡量每个经济体批准的区域贸易安排数量的经济一体化代理变量、商品依赖指标；与出口网络地缘经济脆弱性（GeoV）相关的指标，衡量国家与地缘政治距离较远的伙伴的出口地位；地缘经济连通性（GeoC），衡量贸易关系跨越更广泛地缘政治光谱的程度。GeoC衡量外部“连接者”的定位，这些定位可能通过确保获得更多样化的市场和资源来抵消地缘经济碎片化的成本。值得注意的是，地缘经济联系增加了一个重要的“定位”元素，表明一个国家在地缘政治上联系越紧密，投资-增长联系就越强。国家经济更多样化的定位提高了它们在更多元化的环境中将投资转化为产出的能力。这也表明国家经济增长对“势头”的依赖程度降低，指向更强的冲击吸收能力，证实了面对碎片化压力时，多样化结构对投资增长的好处。
35242.meta: Programs：DEV, IFM, ITI；JEL：F42, F50, F52, F63

35241.title: From People’s War to People’s Rule: Rebel Governance and the Foundations of Inclusive Democracy
35241.zh_title: 从人民战争到人民统治：叛乱治理与包容性民主的基础
35241.authors: Bhishma Bhusal, Michael Callen, Rohini Pande, Soledad A. Prillaman, Deepak Singhania, Apurva Subedi
35241.abstract: How does wartime rebel governance shape post-conflict institutions? We study this in Nepal, where the Maoist People's War (1996–2006) dismantled a 240-year caste-based monarchy and ended with Maoists entering democratic politics. During the conflict, Maoists established sub-national “People’s Governments” that administered justice, collected taxes, and delivered local services. Using a spatial regression-discontinuity design, we show that exposure to People's Governments increased political knowledge and participation especially among historically marginalized indigenous groups (Janajatis). Exposure also reshaped party institutions and inter-party competition: candidate-selection committees in more exposed areas have 26 percent more Janajati members who, drawing on novel implicit-attitude data, exhibit less pro-upper caste bias. Non-Maoist parties' Janajati nomination rates nearly double in fully exposed areas, consistent with competition for newly mobilized voters. Nearly two decades on, local governments in exposed areas score 0.2–0.3 standard deviations higher on state capacity indices and receive 13% more in conditional federal grants. These findings show that when rebel groups enter competitive democratic politics, wartime governance institutions can — through citizen mobilization, party gatekeeping, and cross-party competition — enable a more inclusive and capable post-war state.
35241.zh_abstract: 战时叛乱治理如何塑造冲突后的制度？我们在尼泊尔研究这一问题，该国毛主义人民战争（1996-2006年）推翻了延续240年的种姓制君主制，并以毛主义者进入民主政治而告终。冲突期间，毛主义者建立了地方性的“人民政府”，负责司法、征税和提供本地服务。利用空间断点回归设计，我们表明，接触人民政府提高了政治知识和参与度，尤其是在历史上被边缘化的原住民群体（Janajatis）中。接触还重塑了政党制度和政党间竞争：在接触程度更高的地区，候选人遴选委员会中Janajati成员的比例高出26%，这些成员基于新颖的内隐态度数据，表现出更少的亲上层种姓偏见。在完全接触地区，非毛主义政党的Janajati提名率几乎翻倍，这与争夺新动员的选民相一致。近二十年后，接触地区的地方政府在国家能力指数上得分高出0.2-0.3个标准差，并获得13%更多的有条件联邦拨款。这些发现表明，当叛乱团体进入竞争性民主政治时，战时治理制度可以通过公民动员、政党把关和跨党派竞争，促成更具包容性和能力的战后国家。

35240.title: Preference for Explainable AI
35240.zh_title: 对可解释人工智能的偏好
35240.abstract: Participants acted as loan officers deciding whether to approve real $\$10,000$-loans issued by a private U.S. lender using an AI’s default-risk predictions. When explanations revealed that the AI penalized non-White or female borrowers, participants were more likely to override the AI’s profit-maximizing recommendation. When their bonuses depended on repayment, however, they sought predictions but avoided explanations, consistent with willful ignorance; this effect faded when explanations were framed as purely financial or demographics were hidden. A secondary experiment reveals a novel bias: participants failed to reason contingently and undervalued explanations even when these complemented private information and improved decision accuracy.
35240.zh_abstract: 参与者扮演贷款官员，利用人工智能的违约风险预测，决定是否批准由一家美国私人贷款机构发放的1万美元真实贷款。当解释显示人工智能惩罚了非白人或女性借款人时，参与者更有可能推翻人工智能的利润最大化建议。然而，当他们的奖金取决于还款情况时，他们寻求预测但避免解释，这与故意无知一致；当解释被框定为纯粹财务性的或人口统计信息被隐藏时，这种效应消失。一项辅助实验揭示了一种新的偏见：参与者未能进行条件推理，并且低估了解释的价值，即使这些解释补充了私人信息并提高了决策准确性。
35240.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：B4, C1, C91, C92, D12, D14, D81, G21, G41

35239.title: The Heterogeneous Bank Lending Channel of Monetary Policy
35239.zh_title: 货币政策异质性银行信贷渠道
35239.authors: Jorge Abad, Saki Bigio, Salomon Garcia-Villegas, Joël Marbet, Galo Nuño
35239.abstract: How does heterogeneity in banks' interest-rate risk exposure shape monetary policy transmission? We develop a quantitative macroeconomic model of heterogeneous banks to answer this question. We establish an irrelevance result: differences in interest-rate risk exposure between fixed- and variable-rate banking systems matter for transmission only when bank solvency concerns become relevant. Calibrating the model to the euro area, we show that idiosyncratic default risk pushes a substantial share of banks toward the solvency threshold, making heterogeneity quantitatively important. When policy rates rise, fixed-rate banks suffer net interest margin compression---funding costs increase while legacy loan income stays unchanged---eroding capital and triggering sharper deleveraging. The lending elasticity to monetary policy is one-third larger in fixed-rate economies. The effects extend to financial stability: tightening raises bank failure rates in fixed-rate systems while lowering them in variable-rate systems. The results provide a rationale for macroprudential and monetary policy coordination and for monetary policy gradualism.
35239.zh_abstract: 银行利率风险暴露的异质性如何塑造货币政策传导？我们构建了一个异质性银行的定量宏观经济模型来回答这个问题。我们建立了一个无关性结果：固定利率和浮动利率银行体系之间利率风险暴露的差异，仅当银行偿付能力问题变得相关时才影响传导。将模型校准至欧元区，我们表明，特质性违约风险将相当大比例的银行推向偿付能力阈值，使得异质性在数量上变得重要。当政策利率上升时，固定利率银行遭受净息差压缩——融资成本增加而存量贷款收入保持不变——侵蚀资本并引发更剧烈的去杠杆化。固定利率经济体中，贷款对货币政策的弹性高出三分之一。这种影响延伸到金融稳定：紧缩政策提高了固定利率体系中的银行破产率，同时降低了浮动利率体系中的破产率。这些结果为宏观审慎与货币政策协调以及货币政策渐进主义提供了理由。

35238.title: The Human Capital Production Function: New Estimates and Implications for Labor Supply and Taxes
35238.zh_title: 人力资本生产函数：新估计及其对劳动供给和税收的含义
35238.authors: Han Gao, Michael P. Keane, Kaja Kierulf, Alan Woodland
35238.abstract: This paper estimates a learning-by-doing human-capital production function in which hours affect both current productivity and future human capital. We show that the standard Ben-Porath specification is weakly identified: its objective function is nearly flat along a ridge in parameter space, undermining conventional inference. We develop a flexible sieve alternative that is well-identified, and estimate a concave hours technology using PSID data. Embedding this technology in a life-cycle model, we find very small prime-age labor-supply responses to temporary wage shocks. Despite these low elasticities, optimal labor-income taxes are flat because they distort both current labor supply and future human-capital accumulation.
35238.zh_abstract: 本文估计了一个干中学的人力资本生产函数，其中工作时间同时影响当前生产率和未来人力资本。我们表明，标准的Ben-Porath设定是弱识别的：其目标函数在参数空间的一条脊线上近乎平坦，削弱了传统推断。我们开发了一个灵活且良好识别的筛子替代方法，并使用PSID数据估计了一个凹的工作时间技术。将此技术嵌入生命周期模型后，我们发现壮年劳动力对临时工资冲击的劳动供给反应非常小。尽管这些弹性很低，最优劳动所得税却是平坦的，因为它们同时扭曲了当前劳动供给和未来人力资本积累。
35238.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：C13, C14, H21, J22, J24

35237.title: Unlocking Mortgage Lock-In: Equilibrium Effects in a Spatial Housing Ladder Model
35237.zh_title: 解锁抵押贷款锁定效应：空间住房阶梯模型中的均衡效应
35237.authors: Julia Fonseca, Lu Liu, Pierre Mabille
35237.abstract: Mortgage borrowers are "locked in": forgoing moves to hold on to low rates. Lock-in reduces both housing supply, through households who do not sell, and demand, through households who do not buy elsewhere, evidenced by a 40% drop in U.S. existing home sales between 2022 and 2024. We show that mortgage lock-in raises net housing demand: missing downsizers stay in larger homes, particularly in expensive areas, demanding more housing and offsetting a third of the aggregate house price decline caused by higher rates. Using individual-level mortgage data, we provide causal evidence that lock-in disproportionately reduces moves down the housing ladder. We design a spatial housing ladder model with long-term mortgages, which generates a distribution of locked-in rates and a causal effect on mobility consistent with the data, and use it to study the equilibrium effects of lock-in. A temporary rate hike causes lock-in, increasing aggregate house prices by 4.4% and rents by 1.5% relative to a counterfactual without lock-in, while mortgage borrowers' mobility falls by 25%. A $\$10$k tax credit to starter-home sellers modestly increases mobility but raises trade-up home prices. We estimate a cost of $\$650$k per marginal move, indicating that demand-based housing policies are poorly targeted responses to lock-in in our model.
35237.zh_abstract: 抵押贷款借款人被“锁定”：放弃搬家以维持低利率。锁定效应通过不出售的住户减少住房供给，并通过不在其他地方购买的住户减少需求，这由2022年至2024年间美国现有房屋销售下降40%所证明。我们表明，抵押贷款锁定提高了净住房需求：未搬家的换小房者留在更大的房屋中，尤其是在昂贵地区，从而需求更多住房，抵消了因利率上升导致的总体房价下跌的三分之一。利用个人层面的抵押贷款数据，我们提供了因果证据，表明锁定效应不成比例地减少了沿住房阶梯向下的搬家。我们设计了一个包含长期抵押贷款的空间住房阶梯模型，该模型生成了锁定利率的分布以及对流动性的因果效应，与数据一致，并用于研究锁定效应的均衡效应。临时加息导致锁定效应，相对于无锁定的反事实，总体房价上涨4.4%，租金上涨1.5%，而抵押贷款借款人的流动性下降25%。向首次购房者卖家提供1万美元税收抵免，适度提高了流动性，但推高了换大房价格。我们估计每增加一次搬家的成本为65万美元，这表明在我们的模型中，基于需求的住房政策对锁定效应的应对目标不精准。
35237.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E21, E44, E52, E61, G5, R20, R3

35236.title: Firm-Worker Matches: Experience or Inspection Goods?
35236.zh_title: 企业-工人匹配：体验品还是检验品？
35236.authors: Victoria Gregory, Guido Menzio, Giovanni M. Topa
35236.abstract: We propose a novel empirical strategy to infer the extent to which firm-worker matches are inspection or experience goods. We argue that the informative content of the signals that firms and workers receive about the productivity of their match before entering an employment relationship can be inferred from the gaps between the separation rates of workers hired from unemployment, employment at low-tenure jobs, and employment at high-tenure jobs. We implement the strategy using German administrative data. We find that, before entering an employment relationship, a firm and a worker receive a signal that reduces the variance of their beliefs about the productivity of the match by 67%. The informative content of the signal varies according to the gender and the education of the worker, and it has increased over time. If matches were pure inspection goods, labor productivity would be 1.5% higher, and output 2% higher. If matches were pure experience goods, labor productivity would be 2% lower, and output 4% lower.
35236.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的实证策略，以推断企业-工人匹配在多大程度上是检验品或体验品。我们认为，在建立雇佣关系之前，企业和工人收到的关于匹配生产率的信号的信息含量，可以从失业者、低任期工作就业者和高任期工作就业者中雇用的工人的离职率差距中推断出来。我们使用德国行政数据实施该策略。我们发现，在建立雇佣关系之前，企业和工人收到一个信号，该信号将他们对匹配生产率的信念方差减少了67%。信号的信息含量因工人的性别和教育程度而异，并且随着时间的推移而增加。如果匹配是纯检验品，劳动生产率将提高1.5%，产出将提高2%。如果匹配是纯体验品，劳动生产率将降低2%，产出将降低4%。

35235.title: Cheapflation Cycles
35235.abstract: We document a new source of fluctuations in inflation inequality. When the cost of upstream inputs rises, varieties within a product category tend to have similar absolute price increases. However, the same absolute price increase constitutes a larger percentage change for low-price products, resulting in excess inflation at the low end (“cheapflation”). Since low-income households tend to buy lower-priced varieties, the inflation rates they face are disproportionately sensitive to upstream costs. Using data on food-at-home purchases, we show that this mechanism generates cycles in inflation inequality and excessive volatility in inflation for low-income households relative to high-income households. This channel parsimoniously accounts for observed fluctuations in inflation inequality over time, including surges in cheapflation and inflation inequality during both the Great Recession and the 2021–2023 post-pandemic inflation. Official statistics mask these within-category differences in inflation and thus understate the differences in inflation experienced by low- and high-income households by 70–90 percent. We provide evidence that this mechanism applies to a range of consumption categories beyond food at home. The same mechanism also leads to systematic differences in inflation across cities and import price inflation across countries in response to nationwide and global cost shocks.
35235.zh_abstract: 我们记录了通胀不平等波动的一个新来源。当上游投入成本上升时，产品类别内的品种往往有相似的绝对价格上涨。然而，相同的绝对价格上涨对低价产品构成更大的百分比变化，导致低端产品出现超额通胀（“廉价通胀”）。由于低收入家庭倾向于购买较低价格的品种，他们面临的通胀率对上游成本不成比例地敏感。利用家庭食品购买数据，我们表明，这一机制产生了通胀不平等的周期，以及低收入家庭相对于高收入家庭通胀的过度波动。这一渠道简洁地解释了通胀不平等随时间观察到的波动，包括在大衰退和2021-2023年疫情后通胀期间廉价通胀和通胀不平等的激增。官方统计掩盖了这些类别内的通胀差异，因此将低收入和高收入家庭经历的通胀差异低估了70-90%。我们提供证据表明，这一机制适用于除家庭食品之外的一系列消费类别。同样的机制还导致，在应对全国性和全球性成本冲击时，不同城市之间的通胀以及不同国家的进口价格通胀出现系统性差异。

35234.title: Attorney Value-Added and Racial Disparities in the Criminal Justice System
35234.zh_title: 律师增值与刑事司法系统中的种族差异
35234.authors: Maya Mikdash, Mark Hoekstra, Suhyeon Oh
35234.abstract: Racial disparities permeate the criminal justice system, yet indigent defense attorneys remain understudied despite representing 80% of defendants. Using quasi-randomly court-appointed attorneys in a large Texas county, we show that higher-quality attorneys are less experienced and attended lower-quality law schools. Low-quality representation disproportionately harms Black defendants: a one-standard-deviation increase in quality raises Black dismissal rates nearly twice that of Whites’ (7.1% versus 3.9%), and top-10% representation increases dismissals by 12–17% and reduces jail by 13-22% relative to Whites. Back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest if half of court-appointed attorneys were top-10% quality, the racial gap in jail sentencing would decline by 11%.
35234.zh_abstract: 种族差异渗透到刑事司法系统中，然而尽管公设辩护律师代表了80%的被告，他们仍未得到充分研究。利用德克萨斯州一个大县准随机法院指定的律师，我们表明，更高质量的律师经验较少，且毕业于质量较低的法学院。低质量代理对黑人被告的伤害不成比例：质量每提高一个标准差，黑人被告的驳回率提高幅度几乎是白人的两倍（7.1%对3.9%），而前10%质量的代理使驳回率提高12-17%，监禁率降低13-22%，相对于白人而言。粗略计算表明，如果一半的法院指定律师具有前10%的质量，监禁判决中的种族差距将下降11%。

35233.title: The Educational Impacts of School Phone Bans: Evidence from Brazil
35233.zh_title: 校园手机禁令的教育影响：来自巴西的证据
35233.authors: Guilherme Lichand, Luca Moreno-Louzada, Thiago da Costa, Matthew Gentzkow
35233.abstract: Concerns about negative impacts of student phone use have led to calls around the world for tighter restrictions on phones in schools. This paper evaluates the impact of a 2023 policy that banned non-pedagogical uses of phones within schools in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. To isolate the causal effects of the policy, we contrast middle schools that already had strict rules on phone use prior to the policy ("control schools'') to similar schools that did not have strict rules ("treatment schools''), before and after the ban. While restrictions were imperfectly implemented both before and after the ban, we show that in-school phone use fell substantially in treatment schools relative to control. We then show that test scores, which were trending similarly in the two groups prior to the ban, improved by 0.06 s.d. in treatment schools relative to control.
35233.zh_abstract: 对学生使用手机负面影响的担忧，已在全球范围内引发了对学校实施更严格手机限制的呼声。本文评估了巴西里约热内卢2023年一项禁止在学校内进行非教学用途手机使用的政策的影响。为隔离该政策的因果效应，我们将该政策实施前已对手机使用有严格规定的中学（“控制组学校”）与没有严格规定的类似学校（“处理组学校”）在禁令前后进行对比。尽管禁令前后限制措施的执行均不完美，但我们发现，相对于控制组，处理组学校的校内手机使用量大幅下降。随后我们证明，在禁令前两组趋势相似的考试成绩，在处理组学校相对于控制组提高了0.06个标准差。

35232.title: Designing More Informative Tests: Separating Execution from Recognition
35232.zh_title: 设计更具信息量的测试：将执行能力与识别能力分离
35232.abstract:
Tests are widely used to measure ability, yet performance on a test often reflects more than the ability to execute assigned tasks. It also reflects the ability to recognize which tasks are worth attempting, how they should be prioritized, and how effort should be allocated under uncertainty. This paper studies how tests can be designed to separate these capabilities. 
We model a test as a sequential decision problem. Tasks differ in difficulty, their ordering is uncertain, and examinees may acquire costly information about that ordering before choosing how to proceed. The testing environment is the informational structure surrounding the realized test: in particular, the examinee's beliefs about how task difficulty has been arranged. Performance is therefore generated by an optimal recognition–execution policy, not by execution skill alone. 
The analysis delivers two negative results. First, even in the simplest two-task environment, a single score exhibits dimensional collapse: distinct combinations of execution skill and recognition capability generate identical expected scores. Second, with three tasks, the relationship between capabilities and scores becomes environment-dependent: changing beliefs about task ordering can change which actions are considered and how capabilities translate into performance. 
These results imply that standard scores are not generally informative enough to separate the capabilities that generate performance. This matters because scores are used to summarize what individuals can do and to guide downstream decisions about placement, training, and instruction. If a test does not separately reveal execution and recognition, it provides limited guidance about which capability is strong, which is weak, and where improvement should be directed. 
We then show how more informative tests can be designed. Under a simple communicability constraint, two canonical environments—ordered and randomized tests—induce distinct relationships between capabilities and scores. In an ordered test, recognition is suppressed and performance isolates execution. In a randomized test, recognition is activated and performance reflects both execution and recognition. Observing performance across these environments separates capabilities that are confounded in any single score. 
The paper reframes testing as a problem of informational design: tests should be designed not only to record performance, but to reveal the distinct capabilities that generate it.
35232.zh_abstract: 测试被广泛用于衡量能力，然而测试中的表现往往反映的不仅仅是执行指定任务的能力。它还反映了识别哪些任务值得尝试、应如何排序以及在不确定性下如何分配努力的能力。本文研究如何设计测试以分离这些能力。我们将测试建模为一个序贯决策问题。任务难度不同，其顺序不确定，考生在决定如何推进前可以获取关于该顺序的昂贵信息。测试环境是围绕已实现测试的信息结构：特别是考生关于任务难度如何安排的信念。因此，表现是由最优的识别-执行策略生成的，而非仅由执行技能决定。分析得出了两个负面结果。首先，即使在最简单的双任务环境中，单一分数也表现出维度坍缩：执行技能和识别能力的不同组合会产生相同的期望分数。其次，在三个任务的情况下，能力与分数之间的关系变得依赖于环境：改变关于任务顺序的信念会改变哪些行动被考虑以及能力如何转化为表现。这些结果表明，标准分数通常不足以提供足够信息来分离产生表现的能力。这一点很重要，因为分数被用来总结个人能力并指导关于分班、培训和教学的后续决策。如果测试不能分别揭示执行能力和识别能力，它就无法提供关于哪种能力强、哪种能力弱以及改进方向在哪里的有限指导。然后，我们展示了如何设计更具信息量的测试。在简单的可沟通性约束下，两种典型环境——有序测试和随机测试——会诱导出能力与分数之间的不同关系。在有序测试中，识别能力被抑制，表现孤立地反映执行能力。在随机测试中，识别能力被激活，表现同时反映执行能力和识别能力。观察这些环境下的表现可以分离出在任何单一分数中都被混淆的能力。本文将测试重新定义为信息设计问题：测试的设计不仅应记录表现，还应揭示产生表现的不同能力。
35232.meta: Programs：ED；JEL：C90, D83, I21, I24, J24, O33

35231.title: Has the United States Bent the Health Care Cost Curve?
35231.zh_title: 美国是否已经扭转了医疗成本曲线？
35231.authors: David M. Cutler, Lev R. Klarnet
35231.abstract: In 2024, medical spending as a share of GDP was 15% below forecasts made in 2010 and only marginally higher than in 2010. Relative to expectations, the savings were nearly $\$1$ trillion in 2024. In light of this prolonged period of slower growth, we ask the question: has the United States bent the health care cost curve? We start with a model of medical spending that incorporates both the development of new technologies and the equilibrium use of those technologies. Technology development and incentives around its use may add to or subtract from spending growth. We then examine the drivers of the spending slowdown empirically. We attribute slower medical spending growth to five factors: the development of technologies that simultaneously improve health and lower cost; long-run supply elasticities that exceed short-run elasticities; improvements in population health; reimbursement changes that reduce demand and make demand more price elastic; and reductions in the rate of price increases, likely driven by some of these same demand factors. Because these cost slowing mechanisms are expanding over time, we conclude that the United States has bent the health care cost curve, though not as much as it could be or will need to be bent.
35231.zh_abstract: 2024年，医疗支出占GDP的比重比2010年的预测低15%，且仅略高于2010年的水平。相对于预期，2024年的节省额接近1万亿美元。鉴于这一长期增长放缓，我们提出一个问题：美国是否已经扭转了医疗成本曲线？我们从医疗支出模型入手，该模型既包含新技术的开发，也包含这些技术的均衡使用。技术开发及其使用激励可能增加或减少支出增长。然后，我们实证考察了支出放缓的驱动因素。我们将医疗支出增长放缓归因于五个因素：同时改善健康并降低成本的技术的开发；长期供给弹性超过短期弹性；人口健康状况的改善；降低需求并使需求更具价格弹性的报销变化；以及价格上涨率的下降，这很可能部分由相同的需求因素驱动。由于这些成本减缓机制随时间推移而扩大，我们得出结论：美国已经扭转了医疗成本曲线，尽管尚未达到可能或需要的程度。

35230.title: The (Lack of) Efficacy of Social Belonging and Growth Mindset Interventions Among College Students
35230.zh_title: 社会归属感和成长心态干预对大学生效果的（缺乏）有效性
35230.authors: Abid N. Alam, Philip Oreopoulos, Uros Petronijevic
35230.abstract: Using four large-scale experiments across two major Canadian universities, we experimentally evaluate the effects of growth mindset and social belonging interventions on student outcomes. In a sample of nearly 12,000 students, we find no immediate or dynamic effects on student grades and no effect on persistence through university. We further combine survey and administrative data with machine learning methods to explore treatment effect heterogeneity, finding no evidence of meaningful variation in treatment effects across student subgroups. Despite the recent promise of these light-touch interventions, our findings indicate further research is required to identify the contexts in which their benefits generalize.
35230.zh_abstract: 通过在加拿大两所主要大学进行的四项大规模实验，我们实验性地评估了成长心态和社会归属感干预对学生结果的影响。在近12,000名学生的样本中，我们发现这些干预对学生成绩没有即时或动态影响，对大学持续就读也没有影响。我们进一步结合调查数据和行政数据与机器学习方法探索处理效应异质性，发现没有证据表明学生子群体之间存在有意义的处理效应变异。尽管这些轻触式干预近期展现出前景，但我们的发现表明，需要进一步研究以确定其益处能够推广的情境。

35229.title: The Limits of Targeted Hiring Subsidies: Evidence from the Work Opportunity Tax Credit
35229.zh_title: 定向雇佣补贴的局限性：来自工作机会税收抵免的证据
35229.authors: Manisha Jain, Corina Mommaerts, Jeffrey Weaver
35229.abstract: Employer-side wage subsidies are widely used to promote employment among disadvantaged workers. We study how such subsidies translate into firm hiring behavior using the federal Work Opportunity Tax Credit, which subsidizes up to 40% of first-year wages and covers over two million hires annually. Using linked administrative data from Wisconsin and multiple quasi-experimental designs, we find consistent and precise null effects on hiring, earnings, retention, and related outcomes across designs and firm types. Original data on firm hiring practices suggest two mechanisms that can limit employer-side subsidy efficacy: perceived legal risks discourage eligibility screening and organizational frictions attenuate decision-makers’ responsiveness.
35229.zh_abstract: 雇主方工资补贴被广泛用于促进弱势工人的就业。我们利用联邦工作机会税收抵免来研究此类补贴如何转化为企业的雇佣行为，该补贴最高可补贴第一年工资的40%，每年覆盖超过200万次雇佣。通过使用威斯康星州的关联行政数据和多种准实验设计，我们发现，在不同设计和企业类型中，对雇佣、收入、留任及相关结果的影响一致且精确地为零。关于企业雇佣实践的原始数据表明，限制雇主方补贴有效性的两种机制是：感知的法律风险阻碍了资格筛查，以及组织摩擦削弱了决策者的响应能力。

35228.title: Industrial Concentration, Property Values, and Municipal Bond Spreads
35228.zh_title: 产业集中度、房产价值与市政债券利差
35228.abstract: This paper shows that the industrial composition of a city's local economy affects its municipal borrowing costs. In a panel of 1,177 U.S. cities from 2005 to 2022, greater sectoral concentration magnifies default risk and raises bond spreads, especially for cities dominated by industries associated with low property values. Instrumental variables exploiting national sector-employment trends and regional house-price variation support a causal interpretation. A calibrated model of city default suggests that the observed spread effect understates the gross risk created by concentration, because higher concentration can generate agglomeration benefits that reduce spreads, especially for high-property-value cities.
35228.zh_abstract: 本文表明，城市地方经济的产业构成会影响其市政借款成本。在2005年至2022年1,177个美国城市的面板数据中，更大的部门集中度放大了违约风险并提高了债券利差，尤其是在以低房产价值行业为主导的城市。利用国家部门就业趋势和区域房价变动的工具变量支持了因果解释。一个校准的城市违约模型表明，观察到的利差效应低估了集中度产生的总风险，因为更高的集中度可以产生集聚效益从而降低利差，特别是对于高房产价值城市而言。

35227.title: The Optimal Use of AI in Financial Regulation
35227.zh_title: 人工智能在金融监管中的最优使用
35227.abstract: We study whether AI methods applied to large-scale portfolio holdings data can improve macroprudential financial regulation. We build a graph-based deep learning model tailored to security-level data on the holdings of financial intermediaries. The architecture incorporates economic priors and learns latent representations of both assets and investors from the network structure of portfolio positions. Applied to the universe of non-bank financial intermediaries, covering nearly $\$40$ trillion in wealth, the model substantially outperforms existing approaches in out-of-sample forecasts of intermediary trading behavior, including in crisis episodes. The model has more than ten times the explanatory power for the cross-sectional variation in asset returns during stress events compared to traditional approaches, and it outperforms existing systemic risk metrics at the institution level. Its learned representations show that the holdings network encodes rich, economically interpretable information about fire- sale vulnerability.
