The architecture is fully inductive, producing informative estimates even when entire asset classes or investors are withheld from training. We embed our empirical approach into a macroprudential optimal policy framework to formalize why these objects matter for policy and welfare. We show that even in an equilibrium environment subject to the Lucas critique, the predictive information from the model improves welfare by sharpening the cross-sectional targeting of policy interventions, and we demonstrate a complementarity between prediction and structural knowledge.
35227.zh_abstract: 我们研究将人工智能方法应用于大规模投资组合持有数据是否能改善宏观审慎金融监管。我们构建了一个基于图的深度学习模型，专门针对金融中介机构持有的证券级数据。该架构融入了经济先验知识，并从投资组合头寸的网络结构中学习资产和投资者的潜在表征。将该模型应用于覆盖近40万亿美元财富的非银行金融中介机构整体，其在预测中介交易行为（包括危机时期）的样本外表现上大幅优于现有方法。在压力事件期间，该模型对资产回报横截面变异的解释力是传统方法的十倍以上，并且在机构层面优于现有的系统性风险指标。其学习到的表征表明，持有网络编码了关于火线抛售脆弱性的丰富且具有经济可解释性的信息。该架构是完全归纳式的，即使整个资产类别或投资者被排除在训练之外，也能产生信息丰富的估计。我们将实证方法嵌入宏观审慎最优政策框架，以正式说明这些对象为何对政策和福利至关重要。我们证明，即使在受卢卡斯批判影响的均衡环境中，模型的预测信息通过增强政策干预的横截面针对性来改善福利，并且我们展示了预测与结构性知识之间的互补性。
35227.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C4, G1, G2

35226.title: A Promise Worth Keeping? Impacts of Free Community College on Degrees and Earnings
35226.zh_title: 值得信守的承诺？免费社区大学对学位和收入的影响
35226.authors: Paige Schoonover, Jonathon Attridge, Celeste K. Carruthers, Jilleah G. Welch
35226.abstract: We study Tennessee Promise, Tennessee’s tuition-free community college program, which preceded similar programs in over twenty states and multiple federal proposals. We examine how Promise affected college enrollment and early adult outcomes as the program expanded from a single-county pilot to statewide eligibility. Promise increased college enrollment by 5.4 percentage points among 19-year-olds, increased transfers from two-year to four-year schools, increased associate’s degree attainment by 2.9 percentage points among 21-year-olds, imprecisely increased bachelor’s degree attainment by age 24, and weakly increased income from age 21. We estimate that the program pays for itself under reasonable assumptions about returns to college.
35226.zh_abstract: 我们研究了田纳西承诺计划，即田纳西州的免学费社区大学项目，该项目先于二十多个州的类似项目和多项联邦提案。我们考察了该计划如何影响大学入学和早期成人结果，因为该计划从单一县的试点扩展到全州范围的资格。承诺计划使19岁青年的大学入学率提高了5.4个百分点，增加了从两年制学校向四年制学校的转学，使21岁青年的副学士学位获得率提高了2.9个百分点，对24岁前的学士学位获得率有不精确的提高，并微弱地提高了21岁起的收入。我们估计，在关于大学回报的合理假设下，该计划能够收回成本。

35225.title: States as Financiers: International Lending in War and Peace
35225.zh_title: 国家作为金融家：战争与和平时期的国际借贷
35225.authors: Sebastian Horn, Carmen M. Reinhart, Christoph Trebesch
35225.abstract: States are major international financiers, but their role is poorly understood. We study state-driven cross-border lending over two centuries using a new database covering 1.2 million official loans and grants by 134 governments and 70 multilateral institutions since 1790. We document a dual, state-contingent structure of international credit. In normal times, private creditors dominate cross-border lending. In adverse states of the world, such as wars and financial crises, official creditors step in, at times on a massive scale. These official flows are driven by great powers, are highly subsidized, and are largely absent from canonical models in international macroeconomics.
35225.zh_abstract: 国家是重要的国际金融家，但其作用尚不为人所充分理解。我们利用一个新数据库研究两个世纪以来由国家驱动的跨境贷款，该数据库涵盖了自1790年以来134个政府和70个多边机构提供的120万笔官方贷款和赠款。我们记录了国际信贷的一种双重、依国家状态而定的结构。在正常时期，私人债权人主导跨境贷款。在世界处于不利状态时，例如战争和金融危机，官方债权人会介入，有时规模巨大。这些官方资金流动由大国驱动，获得高度补贴，并且在国际宏观经济学的经典模型中基本被忽略。
35225.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E42, F33, F34, F35, F36, G01, G20, N01, N2

35224.title: Credit Supply, Firms, and Earnings Inequality
35224.zh_title: 信贷供给、企业与收入不平等
35224.authors: Christian Moser, Farzad Saidi, Benjamin Wirth, Stefanie Wolter
35224.abstract: We study the distributional consequences of monetary policy-induced credit supply in the German labor market. Firms in relationships with banks that are more exposed to the introduction of negative interest rates in 2014 experience a relative contraction in credit supply, associated with lower average wages. Within firms, initially lower-paid workers are more likely to leave employment, while initially higher-paid workers see a relative decline in wages. Between firms, wages fall by more at initially higher-paying employers. Our results suggest that credit affects the distribution of wages and employment both within and between firms.
35224.zh_abstract: 我们研究了货币政策引发的信贷供给在德国劳动力市场中的分配效应。与那些更易受到2014年引入负利率影响的银行有业务往来的企业，经历了信贷供给的相对收缩，这伴随着平均工资的下降。在企业内部，最初收入较低的工人更有可能离开工作岗位，而最初收入较高的工人则经历了工资的相对下降。在企业之间，工资在最初支付较高的雇主那里下降得更多。我们的结果表明，信贷同时影响企业内和企业间的工资与就业分布。
35224.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E51, J23, J31

35223.title: Management of Health Care Facilities and Patient Attendance during Major Disruptions: Evidence from Kenya
35223.zh_title: 重大干扰期间医疗设施管理与患者就诊率：来自肯尼亚的证据
35223.authors: Kathryn Andrews, Fabiano Dal-Ri, Roberta Gatti, Renata Lemos, Mario Macis, Lydia Nakhone
35223.abstract: This paper measures and analyzes management practices in the Kenyan health care sector, drawing on a nationally representative survey and linked administrative data. The paper adapts the World Management Survey to measure management quality in primary health care facilities and hospitals, surveying 429 primary health care facilities and 73 hospitals. Primary health care facilities are the primary point of contact for most patients, providing treatment for common infectious diseases and chronic conditions, as well as services related to maternal and child health. Management quality is low on average, and the distribution is highly compressed. The analysis uses administrative data to test the association between the management quality and performance of primary health care facilities, measured by outpatient attendance, during a period of disruption that included the COVID-19 pandemic and a public health workers’ strike. Overall attendance fell during this period. Private facilities experienced a smaller decline than public facilities, consistent with substitution during the strike. Within the private sector, better-managed facilities showed greater resilience, driven primarily by operations management. These results underscore the role of management quality in strengthening facility-level resilience and the complementarity of public and private sectors in absorbing healthcare shocks.
35223.zh_abstract: 本文利用一项全国代表性调查和关联的行政数据，衡量并分析了肯尼亚医疗部门的管理实践。本文改编了世界管理调查，以衡量初级医疗设施和医院的管理质量，调查了429个初级医疗设施和73家医院。初级医疗设施是大多数患者的主要接触点，提供常见传染病和慢性病的治疗，以及与母婴健康相关的服务。管理质量平均较低，且分布高度集中。该分析利用行政数据，在包括COVID-19大流行和公共卫生工作者罢工的干扰期间，检验了初级医疗设施的管理质量与其绩效（以门诊就诊率衡量）之间的关联。在此期间，总体就诊率下降。私营设施的下滑幅度小于公共设施，这与罢工期间的替代效应一致。在私营部门内，管理较好的设施表现出更强的韧性，这主要由运营管理驱动。这些结果强调了管理质量在加强设施层面韧性中的作用，以及公共和私营部门在吸收医疗冲击方面的互补性。

35222.title: Explaining Movements in Government Debt
35222.authors: Tatiana Kirsanova, Eric M. Leeper, Campbell B. Leith, Ding Liu
35222.abstract: Standard New Keynesian models with time-consistent policy predict minimal debt responses to conventional shocks, as a debt stabilization bias dominates tax-smoothing motives. We show that two mechanisms can generate debt movements of the magnitude observed in the data: increases in policymaker myopia and declines in real interest rates, such as during flight-to-safety episodes. Other potential drivers—changes in markups, debt maturity, government transfers, or large recessions—cannot account for such fluctuations.
35222.zh_abstract: 具有时间一致性政策的标准新凯恩斯模型预测，债务对常规冲击的反应极小，因为债务稳定偏差压倒了税收平滑动机。我们表明，两种机制可以产生数据中观察到的债务变动幅度：政策制定者短视程度的增加和实际利率的下降（例如在避险时期）。其他潜在驱动因素——加成率、债务期限、政府转移支付的变化或严重衰退——无法解释此类波动。

35209.title: State Dependence of Monetary Policy During Global Supply Chain Disruptions
35209.zh_title: 全球供应链中断期间货币政策的路径依赖性
35209.authors: Xiwen Bai, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Yiliang Li, Francesco Zanetti
35209.abstract: We study how global supply chain disruptions affect monetary policy transmission. Post-pandemic evidence indicates surging transportation costs, goods-market imbalances, and rising prices. We develop a model in which logistical bottlenecks (upstream slack coexisting with downstream shortages) steepen the aggregate supply curve. This convexity amplifies price responses to monetary policy while dampening output effects. Threshold VAR and Local Projection estimates are consistent with this mechanism: during disruptions, contractionary policy reduces prices more at smaller output cost, easing the stabilization trade-off.
35209.zh_abstract: 我们研究了全球供应链中断如何影响货币政策的传导。疫情后的证据表明，运输成本飙升、商品市场失衡以及物价上涨。我们构建了一个模型，其中物流瓶颈（上游闲置与下游短缺并存）使总供给曲线变得陡峭。这种凸性放大了价格对货币政策的反应，同时抑制了产出效应。阈值向量自回归（VAR）和局部投影（Local Projection）的估计结果与这一机制一致：在供应链中断期间，紧缩性政策以较小的产出成本更有效地降低价格，从而缓解了稳定目标的权衡困境。

35289.title: What do news readers want?
35289.authors: Gregory J. Martin, Shoshana Vasserman, Cameron Pfiffer
35289.abstract: Using a novel dataset covering the complete history of individual-level web traffic and digital subscriptions from a major metropolitan newspaper in the United States between 2020 and 2024, we investigate consumers' willingness to pay for different categories of news content, with particular focus on the kinds of coverage believed to generate civic externalities. Our identification strategy relies on the quasi-random arrival of paywall events which force consumers to subscribe if they wish to continue reading. Using this variation, we estimate a model of consumer demand and construct the optimal staff allocation for the paper under different counterfactual revenue models: a fully subscription-based model and a fully ad-supported model. Our results suggest that readers are willing to pay for local reporting, and that measures of demand based only on time-use substantially underestimate the value of “hard” news coverage on topics like local politics and public health. However, digital subscription revenues alone are insufficient to cover staff costs even at the highest revenue-generating sections of the paper. We use our model to estimate the subsidy required to expand the newspaper's production of investigative coverage.
35289.zh_abstract: 利用一个涵盖2020年至2024年间美国某大都市报纸个体层面网络流量和数字订阅完整历史的新数据集，我们研究了消费者对不同类别新闻内容的支付意愿，特别关注那些被认为能产生公民外部性的报道类型。我们的识别策略依赖于付费墙事件的准随机出现，这些事件迫使消费者如果想继续阅读就必须订阅。利用这种变化，我们估计了一个消费者需求模型，并在不同的反事实收入模型下构建了报纸的最优员工配置：一个完全基于订阅的模型和一个完全由广告支持的模型。我们的结果表明，读者愿意为本地报道付费，并且仅基于时间使用的需求度量大大低估了关于地方政治和公共卫生等主题的“硬”新闻报道的价值。然而，即使在报纸收入最高的板块，仅靠数字订阅收入也不足以覆盖员工成本。我们利用模型来估算扩大报纸调查性报道生产所需的补贴。

35288.title: Water Works: Causes and Consequences of Safe Drinking Water in America
35288.zh_title: 水的作用：美国安全饮用水的原因与后果
35288.authors: David A. Keiser, Bhashkar Mazumder, David Molitor, Joseph S. Shapiro
35288.abstract: Since the 1974 Safe Drinking Water Act, the U.S. has spent $\$2$ trillion to provide safe drinking water, yet drinking water for 10–20 percent of Americans violates standards. We study trends, causes, and consequences of U.S. drinking water pollution, using 266 million readings on 1,250 pollutants over decades that we obtained from 48 states via dozens of Freedom of Information Act and associated requests. We link pollution to administrative Medicare data on older Americans' health outcomes. Three findings emerge. First, U.S. drinking water pollution has declined rapidly; the share of readings exceeding current health standards fell by half from 2003–2019. Unregulated pollutants declined more slowly. Low-income areas have higher pollution; Black and Hispanic communities have more complex patterns. Second, loans provided by the Safe Drinking Water Act to water systems reduce pollution. At the estimated average loan cost-effectiveness, these loans could eliminate pollution above health standards for $\$46$ annually per person. Third, these loans reduce mortality rates of older Americans. Although fiscal federalism cautions against federal funding of local public goods with few inter-jurisdictional externalities like drinking water, we estimate large benefits from Safe Drinking Water Act loans.
35288.zh_abstract: 自1974年《安全饮用水法》颁布以来，美国已花费2万亿美元来提供安全饮用水，然而仍有10%至20%的美国人的饮用水不符合标准。我们利用通过数十次《信息自由法》及相关请求从48个州获得的、涵盖数十年间1250种污染物的2.66亿条读数，研究了美国饮用水污染的趋势、原因和后果。我们将污染数据与关于美国老年人健康结果的行政医疗保险数据联系起来。三个发现浮现出来。首先，美国饮用水污染已迅速下降；从2003年到2019年，超过现行健康标准的读数比例下降了一半。未受监管的污染物下降得更慢。低收入地区的污染更高；黑人和西班牙裔社区的污染模式更为复杂。其次，《安全饮用水法》向供水系统提供的贷款减少了污染。按估计的平均贷款成本效益计算，这些贷款可以消除超过健康标准的污染，每人每年仅需46美元。第三，这些贷款降低了美国老年人的死亡率。尽管财政联邦制警告不要为像饮用水这样跨辖区外部性很少的地方公共产品提供联邦资金，但我们估计《安全饮用水法》贷款带来了巨大的收益。
35288.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, DEV, EEE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H23, H54, I14, Q53

35287.title: The U.S. Civil War's Impact on Women's Work and Political Participation
35287.zh_title: 美国内战对女性工作与政治参与的影响
35287.authors: Madison K. Arnsbarger, Andreas Ferrara, Paige Montrose
35287.abstract: This paper studies the role of economic participation via the labor market in enabling the political mobilization of an underrepresented group. Specifically, we study the wives and daughters of disabled Union Army soldiers after the U.S. Civil War. Linking Union Army enlistment records to the 1860 and 1870 U.S. censuses, we find that the wives and daughters of disabled veterans were significantly more likely to participate in the labor force than those of non-disabled veterans. Historical evidence suggests that disabled veterans were also more exposed to postwar alcohol and substance abuse, increasing the household burdens faced by women. Town-level data show that increases in women's labor force participation combined with higher shares of disabled veterans predict more Temperance Crusade activity in 1873-74. Information provision via newspapers and proximity to other protest towns amplify these effects. Using unit-level disability rates as an instrument for veterans' disability status supports a causal interpretation of the labor market effects. Our results suggest that labor force participation can be an important enabling factor for the political mobilization of underrepresented groups.
35287.zh_abstract: 本文研究了通过劳动力市场的经济参与在促进弱势群体政治动员中的作用。具体而言，我们研究了美国内战后联邦军残疾士兵的妻子和女儿。将联邦军征兵记录与1860年和1870年美国人口普查联系起来，我们发现残疾退伍军人的妻子和女儿比非残疾退伍军人的妻子和女儿更有可能参与劳动力市场。历史证据表明，残疾退伍军人在战后也更易受到酒精和药物滥用的影响，增加了女性面临的家庭负担。城镇层面的数据显示，女性劳动力参与率的提高与残疾退伍军人比例的增加相结合，预示着1873-74年间会有更多的禁酒运动活动。通过报纸提供信息以及靠近其他抗议城镇放大了这些效应。使用单位层面的残疾率作为退伍军人残疾状况的工具变量，支持了劳动力市场效应的因果解释。我们的结果表明，劳动力参与可以成为弱势群体政治动员的重要促进因素。
35287.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, DEV, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, J15, J18, N31

35286.title: Beliefs and Stock Market Fluctuations: New Evidence from the Past Seven Decades
35286.zh_title: 信念与股市波动：来自过去七十年的新证据
35286.abstract: We construct a new long-run series of subjective expected equity returns from an independent equity analysis firm, spanning 1956-2024. These expected returns are strongly positively correlated with the earnings-price ratio, respond negatively to past returns, and predict future returns. These patterns contrast with subjective expectations of individual investors and professional forecasters, which are weakly or negatively correlated with our new measure. Disagreement between sophisticated and individual investors is associated with higher trading volume. Our findings are consistent with a model of heterogeneous beliefs, where naive investors extrapolate past returns, rather than past dividends, while sophisticated investors are close to rational.
35286.zh_abstract: 我们从一个独立的股票分析公司构建了一个新的长期主观预期股票收益率序列，时间跨度为1956年至2024年。这些预期收益率与盈利价格比呈强正相关，对过去收益率呈负反应，并能预测未来收益率。这些模式与个人投资者和专业预测者的主观预期形成对比，后两者与我们的新指标呈弱相关或负相关。成熟投资者与个人投资者之间的分歧与更高的交易量相关。我们的发现与一个异质性信念模型一致，在该模型中，天真的投资者会外推过去的收益率，而不是过去的股息，而成熟的投资者则接近理性。
35286.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：E44, E47, E7, G11, G12, G17, G40

35285.title: Does the Import Invasion Explain the Mysterious Disappearance of Productivity Growth in U.S. Manufacturing?
35285.zh_title: 进口入侵是否解释了美国制造业生产率增长的离奇消失？
35285.abstract: Why did U.S. manufacturing productivity stop growing after 2010? Productivity growth disappeared, evaporating from an annual rate of +3.3 percent during 1987-2010 to -0.3 percent from 2010 to 2023. This paper shifts attention from 2010 as the start of the puzzle to a decade earlier when output stopped growing. This cessation of output growth in 2000 is attributed to the invasion of imports that closed domestic plants, destroyed jobs, and squeezed profits. Then followed a chain of causation that ultimately undermined productivity growth – from falling capacity utilization, to lower investment in fixed capital and R&D, and to an erosion of innovation. Beyond the import invasion, the paper identifies a set of handicaps ranging from self-inflicted wounds by private manufacturing firms to a marked reduction in government-funded R&D spending. Corporate funds were diverted from productive investment to share buybacks. Investment was distorted by environmental, health, safety, and fuel economy regulations. Innovation slowed not only because of diminishing returns to R&D, but also because of a decline in public R&D, and a diversion of private R&D from basic science and process improvements to product refinements and brand extensions. Skilled worker shortages have plagued manufacturing for decades in the absence of sufficient public and private investment in vocational training.
35285.zh_abstract: 为什么美国制造业生产率在2010年后停止增长？生产率增长消失了，从1987年至2010年间每年3.3%的增长率蒸发为2010年至2023年间的-0.3%。本文将注意力从2010年这个谜题开始的时间点转移到十年前产出停止增长的时候。2000年产出的停止增长归因于进口入侵，它关闭了国内工厂，摧毁了就业机会，并挤压了利润。随后出现了一系列因果关系，最终破坏了生产率增长——从产能利用率下降，到固定资本和研发投资减少，再到创新受到侵蚀。除了进口入侵，本文还识别出一系列障碍，从私营制造企业的自伤行为到政府资助的研发支出显著减少。企业资金从生产性投资转向股票回购。投资受到环境、健康、安全和燃油经济性法规的扭曲。创新放缓不仅是因为研发的回报递减，还因为公共研发的减少，以及私人研发从基础科学和工艺改进转向产品改良和品牌延伸。在缺乏足够的公共和私人职业培训投资的情况下，熟练工人短缺已困扰制造业数十年。

35284.title: Optimal Long-Term Care Provision and Insurance with Heterogeneous Preferences and Risks
35284.zh_title: 具有异质性偏好和风险的最优长期护理提供与保险
35284.authors: Nicholas-James Clavet, Pierre-Carl Michaud, Julien Navaux
35284.abstract: We develop a model of optimal long-term care provision and insurance with heterogeneous risk and preferences. Using a novel survey experiment, we estimate preferences (demand) for care settings and service bundles. We then calibrate health transitions and the supply of services using Canadian administrative data for the province of Quebec. The optimal insurance scheme has lower co-insurance in nursing homes and higher co-insurance in home care while leading to a constrained expansion of home care services. Relative to the prevailing system, optimal provision increases home care utilization, raises public expenditure threefold, and delivers a large increase in consumer surplus.
35284.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个具有异质性风险和偏好的最优长期护理提供与保险模型。通过一项新颖的调查实验，我们估计了对护理环境和服务包的偏好（需求）。然后，我们使用加拿大魁北克省的行政数据校准了健康转变和服务的供给。最优保险方案在养老院中具有较低的共同保险率，在家庭护理中具有较高的共同保险率，同时导致家庭护理服务的受限扩张。与现行体系相比，最优提供增加了家庭护理的使用，将公共支出提高了三倍，并带来了消费者剩余的大幅增加。

35283.title: AI for Structural Estimation
35283.zh_title: 用于结构估计的人工智能
35283.abstract: We develop a global method to solve and estimate dynamic equilibrium models that treats prices as pseudo parameters and market clearing as moment conditions, and reduces estimation time from days to minutes. Our approach leverages AI algorithms, software, and hardware, and has three building blocks. First, we extend the state space to include equilibrium prices and model parameters, which allows us to clear markets and estimate parameters by solving the model once. Second, we approximate the mapping between parameters and moments by training neural networks on model-simulated data, which act as closed-form expressions for moment conditions. Third, we use this mapping to estimate parameters by minimizing the distance between the model and data moments, and to find equilibrium prices by targeting a market-clearing imbalance of zero. We also use this mapping to assess identification globally, verifying if the estimation objective function has a unique minimum for each parameter. We illustrate our method by estimating a dynamic general equilibrium model of leverage and investment with three state variables, three controls, endogenous default, costly equity issuance, and non-convex adjustment costs. After four days, the traditional approach does not reach the loss we achieve in under 20 minutes. We build an AI agent that applies our method to new models from natural language prompts.
35283.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种全局方法来求解和估计动态均衡模型，该方法将价格视为伪参数，将市场出清视为矩条件，并将估计时间从几天缩短到几分钟。我们的方法利用了人工智能算法、软件和硬件，并包含三个构建模块。首先，我们将状态空间扩展到包括均衡价格和模型参数，这使我们能够通过一次性求解模型来出清市场和估计参数。其次，我们通过在模型模拟数据上训练神经网络来近似参数与矩之间的映射，这些神经网络充当矩条件的闭式表达式。第三，我们利用这个映射，通过最小化模型矩与数据矩之间的距离来估计参数，并通过设定市场出清不平衡为零的目标来寻找均衡价格。我们还利用这个映射来全局评估识别性，验证估计目标函数对于每个参数是否具有唯一最小值。我们通过估计一个具有三个状态变量、三个控制变量、内生违约、昂贵股权发行和非凸调整成本的杠杆与投资动态一般均衡模型来说明我们的方法。传统方法在四天后仍未达到我们在不到20分钟内实现的损失。我们构建了一个人工智能代理，它可以根据自然语言提示将我们的方法应用于新模型。
35283.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：C15, C45, C52, C63

35282.title: Insurer Risk and Public Risk-Sharing: Quantifying the Value of Reinsurance
35282.zh_title: 保险公司风险与公共风险分担：量化再保险的价值
35282.abstract: We study the role of public risk-sharing in markets where firms face substantial cost uncertainty, focusing on public reinsurance in health insurance. We develop a model where insurers internalize cost uncertainty through risk charges that raise effective marginal costs, and create a role for reinsurance. Public reinsurance lowers both expected costs and cost volatility, particularly for smaller insurers, reducing prices and enhancing competition. Using an event study of staggered state-level reinsurance programs, we show that public reinsurance leads insurers to lower prices and private reinsurance purchases, benefiting financially constrained insurers the most. Structural estimates indicate that risk charges account for a substantial share of the premium-cost wedge, and highlight public reinsurance's comparative advantage over premium subsidies by providing risk protection and enhancing competition. Our results underscore the importance of accounting for firms' risk exposure in policy design and provide a general framework for understanding public risk-sharing policies.
35282.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在企业面临巨大成本不确定性的市场中公共风险分担的作用，重点关注健康保险中的公共再保险。我们开发了一个模型，其中保险公司通过提高有效边际成本的风险费用来内化成本不确定性，并为再保险创造了作用。公共再保险降低了预期成本和成本波动性，特别是对于较小的保险公司，从而降低了价格并增强了竞争。利用交错实施的州级再保险项目的事件研究，我们表明公共再保险导致保险公司降低价格和减少私人再保险购买，使财务受限的保险公司受益最大。结构估计表明，风险费用占保费成本差额的很大一部分，并突显了公共再保险相对于保费补贴的比较优势，因为它提供了风险保护并增强了竞争。我们的结果强调了在政策设计中考虑企业风险暴露的重要性，并为理解公共风险分担政策提供了一个通用框架。

35281.title: College Affirmative Action and Students' Outcomes: A Matter of the Dose
35281.zh_title: 大学平权行动与学生成果：剂量问题
35281.authors: Yi Chen, Chao Fu, Hongbin Li, Teng Li, Siyan Tang
35281.abstract: Extensive discussion centers around the question of whether affirmative action (AA) in higher education “works,” despite AA being in practice a continuous policy instrument. We study the dose effects of AA on its intended beneficiaries by exploiting the ethnic minority bonus-point policy in China's centralized college admissions system, where targeted students receive explicit point advantages. Exploring cohort-level fluctuations in exam score distributions that generate plausibly exogenous variation in the effective dose of AA, we show that higher AA doses increase recipients' admissions to colleges and elite colleges, but lower their academic rankings, shift them toward lower-earning majors, and reduce their satisfaction with college life. From data linking college entrance exam (CEE) records to comprehensive card transaction records 10–23 years after CEE, we find that low AA doses increase long-term consumption by 19% but high doses reduce it by 25%. Such non-monotonic dose responses exist across expenditure categories, including child-related expenditure, suggesting potential impacts on future generations. Heterogeneity analysis reveals that while the positive effects of low AA doses persist across student groups, students from stronger academic backgrounds are more resilient to the negative effects of high AA doses. Overall, our results suggest that careful calibration of AA policies is crucial for achieving their intended goals.
35281.zh_abstract: 关于高等教育中的平权行动（AA）是否“有效”的讨论广泛存在，尽管在实践中AA是一种连续的政策工具。我们利用中国集中式大学招生体系中的少数民族加分政策，研究AA对其预期受益者的剂量效应，其中目标学生获得明确的分数优势。通过探索考试分数分布的队列层面波动（这产生了AA有效剂量的外生变化），我们发现较高的AA剂量增加了受益者进入大学和精英大学的机会，但降低了他们的学术排名，将他们转向收入较低的专业，并降低了他们对大学生活的满意度。通过将高考记录与高考后10至23年的综合卡交易记录相关联，我们发现低AA剂量使长期消费增加19%，但高剂量使其减少25%。这种非单调的剂量反应存在于各个支出类别中，包括与儿童相关的支出，表明可能对后代产生影响。异质性分析显示，虽然低AA剂量的积极效应在不同学生群体中持续存在，但来自较强学术背景的学生更能抵御高AA剂量的负面效应。总体而言，我们的结果表明，仔细校准AA政策对于实现其预期目标至关重要。
35281.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I2, I3, J24

35280.title: Medicare Home Health Fraud: How Much, Where, and Who?
35280.zh_title: 医疗保险家庭健康欺诈：程度、地点与实施者
35280.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Yunan Ji, Neale Mahoney, Gideon Moore
35280.abstract: How much fraud is there in Medicare and who commits it? We provide an answer for Medicare home health, a setting widely considered especially rife with fraud. We define a home health agency (HHA) as fraudulent if it was prosecuted by a federal strike force. Combining Medicare claims data on all HHAs with hand-collected prosecution records from the nine federal judicial districts where strike forces operated between 2009 and 2013, we train a machine learning model to predict, out of sample, the probability that each HHA in the remaining 85 districts would have been prosecuted had a strike force been present. We estimate that in 2008, 3.4% of Medicare home health spending — about $\$520$ million — was billed by fraudulent HHAs. The strike forces were well-targeted: their nine districts contained only 40% of home health spending but 65% of fraudulent spending. Fraudulent HHAs display intuitive characteristics: they are more likely to rely on extremely high-volume referring physicians, to exhibit unusually uniform patterns of care, and to serve healthier-than-average patients.
35280.zh_abstract: 医疗保险中存在多少欺诈行为，以及谁在实施欺诈？我们针对家庭健康领域（一个被广泛认为欺诈尤为猖獗的领域）提供了答案。我们将被联邦打击部队起诉的家庭健康机构定义为欺诈机构。通过将涵盖所有家庭健康机构的医疗保险索赔数据与手工收集的2009年至2013年间打击部队运作的九个联邦司法区的起诉记录相结合，我们训练了一个机器学习模型，用于样本外预测：如果存在打击部队，其余85个司法区中的每个家庭健康机构被起诉的概率。我们估计，2008年，医疗保险家庭健康支出的3.4%（约5.2亿美元）是由欺诈性家庭健康机构开具账单的。打击部队的目标定位准确：其九个司法区仅占家庭健康支出的40%，却占欺诈支出的65%。欺诈性家庭健康机构表现出直观的特征：它们更可能依赖极高转诊量的医生，表现出异常统一的护理模式，并服务于比平均更健康的患者。

35279.title: Non-User Externalities
35279.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Jan Fasnacht, Benjamin R. Handel, Rafael Jiménez-Durán, Aaron Leonard, Filip Milojević, Christopher Roth, Cass R. Sunstein
35279.abstract: We review an emerging literature on how non-user externalities—the benefits or harms that product adoption imposes differentially on non-users versus users—shape market outcomes. We first present a unified framework that distinguishes non-user externalities from network effects and classic externalities, such as pollution. A key distinction is that those harmed by classic externalities cannot mitigate harm by joining the externality-producing activity, whereas those harmed by negative non-user externalities can—simply by becoming users. This can expand the harm borne by remaining non-users, generating cascade dynamics that can culminate in product market traps: situations in which individuals would prefer the product not to exist, yet nonetheless choose to adopt it rather than remaining non-users. Using new survey evidence covering 25 product markets, we document that negative non-user externalities are pervasive, that the mechanisms behind them differ systematically across products, and that they generate adoption pressure on non-users. We then discuss how non-user externalities affect welfare analysis, firms’ strategic incentives, and market structure. We conclude by discussing policy responses, including design regulation and collective coordination mechanisms.
35279.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了一个新兴文献，该文献研究非用户外部性——即产品采纳对非用户与用户产生的差异化收益或损害——如何塑造市场结果。我们首先提出了一个统一框架，将非用户外部性与网络效应以及经典外部性（如污染）区分开来。一个关键区别在于，受经典外部性损害的人无法通过加入产生外部性的活动来减轻损害，而受负面非用户外部性损害的人则可以通过成为用户来减轻损害。这可能会扩大剩余非用户所承受的损害，产生级联动态，最终可能导致产品市场陷阱：即个体宁愿该产品不存在，但仍选择采纳它而非保持非用户身份的情况。利用涵盖25个产品市场的新调查证据，我们记录了负面非用户外部性的普遍性，其背后的机制在不同产品间存在系统性差异，并且它们对非用户产生了采纳压力。然后，我们讨论了非用户外部性如何影响福利分析、企业的战略激励以及市场结构。最后，我们讨论了政策应对措施，包括设计监管和集体协调机制。

35278.title: An Ethical Pollution Tax
35278.abstract: Through theory and numerical simulations, I explore how a pollution tax can be designed to accommodate ethical objections. I consider four types of objections that have been raised by ethicists – based on equity concerns, incommensurability, civic responsibility, and commodification. In each case, I theoretically derive a tax designed to respond to the objection, and quantitatively, using a general equilibrium model calibrated to the U.S. economy and carbon dioxide pollution, I show how these accommodations affect the magnitude of the tax and the resulting emissions level. Some accommodations likely have small effects on the carbon tax rate, while others can cause the tax rate to increase fivefold.
35278.zh_abstract: 通过理论和数值模拟，我探讨了如何设计一种污染税以容纳伦理上的反对意见。我考虑了伦理学家提出的四类反对意见——基于公平关切、不可通约性、公民责任和商品化。在每种情况下，我从理论上推导出一种旨在回应这些反对意见的税收，并使用一个以美国经济和二氧化碳污染为校准依据的一般均衡模型，定量地展示了这些调整如何影响税收的幅度以及由此产生的排放水平。一些调整可能对碳税率影响较小，而其他调整则可能导致税率增加五倍。

35277.title: Deadly Stigma
35277.abstract: How harmful is stigma in the “real world”? Answers are elusive because stigma is difficult to measure in observational data, and isolating its effects requires exogenous variation in stigma without variation in the stigmatized trait. This study addresses these challenges by focusing on a widespread form of stigma — weight stigma — in the high-stakes setting of inpatient healthcare. BMI categories are displayed prominently to providers in electronic medical records, and obesity is heavily stigmatized socially. Thus, at the "obese" cutoff, stigma may shift discretely while the underlying trait (BMI) does not. Using a regression discontinuity design that exploits this institutional feature, I find a discontinuous increase in in-hospital mortality at this cutoff, though patient health does not change. Two patterns suggest stigma-based discrimination as the mechanism. First, just-obese patients receive less diagnostic effort than almost-obese patients. Second, a physician-validated LLM identifies at the cutoff a rise in stigmatizing language in clinical notes — specifically, language that imposes moral judgment, undermines patient credibility, and stereotypes patients — among the most stigmatizing providers, who also drive the mortality result. Overall, these results suggest that stigma is a powerful social force with potentially life-or-death consequences.
35277.zh_abstract: 污名在“现实世界”中有多有害？答案难以捉摸，因为污名在观测数据中难以衡量，并且要隔离其影响需要污名的外生变化，而污名化特征本身不变。本研究通过关注住院医疗这一高风险环境中的一种普遍污名形式——体重污名——来应对这些挑战。BMI类别在电子病历中显著地展示给医疗服务提供者，而肥胖在社会上受到严重污名化。因此，在“肥胖”临界点，污名可能发生离散变化，而潜在特征（BMI）则不会。利用利用这一制度特征的断点回归设计，我发现尽管患者健康状况没有变化，但该临界点的院内死亡率出现了不连续的增加。两种模式表明基于污名的歧视是作用机制。首先，刚达到肥胖标准的患者比接近肥胖标准的患者接受的诊断努力更少。其次，一个经医生验证的LLM在临界点识别出临床记录中污名化语言的增加——具体而言，是施加道德评判、削弱患者可信度以及对患者进行刻板印象的语言——这在最具污名化的医疗服务提供者中最为明显，而他们也推动了死亡率结果。总体而言，这些结果表明污名是一种强大的社会力量，可能带来生死攸关的后果。

35276.title: The AGI Race and Existential Risk
35276.zh_title: 通用人工智能竞赛与生存风险
35276.authors: Ethan Bueno de Mesquita, Wioletta Dziuda, Mattias Polborn
35276.abstract: Concerns about the race to artificial general intelligence often assume that competition and resources increase risk by accelerating development. We study a model in which firms allocate scarce resources between speed and safety. Speed increases a firm's chance of reaching AGI first but leaves fewer resources for safety; safety lowers doom risk but slows arrival. Fragmentation increases total speed and conditional doom risk by shifting a fixed industry resource pool toward speed. The model also identifies a critical market size: below it, firms have positive expected payoff from achieving AGI, while above it, firms race even though achieving AGI has negative expected value. More per-firm resources always accelerate expected arrival, but their effect on conditional doom risk changes sign at this cutoff. Policy affects risk by changing equilibrium incentives: consolidation, resource regulation, commitment devices, and cautious public entry can improve welfare in some environments. The results show that AGI risk depends not only on technical considerations, but also on market structure, resource constraints, and institutions that shape the equilibrium allocation between speed and safety.
35276.zh_abstract: 关于通用人工智能竞赛的担忧通常假设竞争和资源通过加速发展来增加风险。我们研究了一个模型，其中企业在速度和安全性之间分配稀缺资源。速度增加了企业率先达到AGI的机会，但留给安全性的资源更少；安全性降低了毁灭风险，但减缓了到达速度。碎片化通过将固定的行业资源池转向速度，增加了总速度和条件毁灭风险。该模型还识别出一个关键市场规模：低于该规模时，企业从实现AGI中获得正预期收益；而高于该规模时，即使实现AGI具有负预期价值，企业仍会竞赛。更多的企业资源总是加速预期到达时间，但它们对条件毁灭风险的影响在此临界点改变符号。政策通过改变均衡激励来影响风险：在某些环境中，整合、资源监管、承诺机制和谨慎的公共进入可以改善福利。结果表明，AGI风险不仅取决于技术考量，还取决于市场结构、资源约束以及塑造速度与安全性之间均衡配置的制度。
35276.meta: Programs：IO, POL；JEL：D0, D20, D21, O3, O30

35275.title: Writing Code vs. Shipping Code: Productivity Effects Across Generations of AI Coding Tools
35275.zh_title: 编写代码与交付代码：AI编码工具各代际的生产率效应
35275.authors: Mert Demirer, Leon Musolff, Liyuan Yang
35275.abstract: How do the productivity effects of AI evolve across successive generations of tools, and to what extent do task-level gains ultimately translate into final output? We study these questions in the context of software development, using data on more than 100,000 GitHub developers combined with their AI usage telemetry. In a matched event study design, we find that autocomplete, interactive coding agents, and autonomous coding agents each significantly increase coding activity (“commits”), with respective cumulative effects of 40%, 140%, and 180%. These gains, however, attenuate sharply across the production hierarchy: the 180% cumulative effect falls to 50% for the number of projects, and to 30% for actual releases. This pattern is consistent with the weak-link hypothesis: the strong productivity gains from AI are attenuated by human bottlenecks in the production chain, with an estimated elasticity of substitution of 0.25 between AI and human effort, which indicates strong complementarities. We further confirm these results across four major app marketplaces, finding a moderate increase in the number of new apps but no increase in total usage. Large task-level AI productivity gains have therefore translated only partially into shipped and used software thus far.
35275.zh_abstract: AI的生产率效应如何在连续几代工具中演变，以及任务层面的收益最终在多大程度上转化为最终产出？我们在软件开发背景下研究这些问题，使用了超过10万名GitHub开发者的数据及其AI使用遥测数据。在一个匹配的事件研究设计中，我们发现自动补全、交互式编码代理和自主编码代理各自显著增加了编码活动（“提交”），累计效应分别为40%、140%和180%。然而，这些收益在生产层级中急剧衰减：180%的累计效应在项目数量上降至50%，在实际发布上降至30%。这种模式与弱环节假说一致：AI带来的强劲生产率收益被生产链中的人力瓶颈所削弱，AI与人力努力之间的替代弹性估计为0.25，这表明存在强互补性。我们进一步在四个主要应用市场中确认了这些结果，发现新应用数量适度增加，但总使用量没有增加。因此，迄今为止，任务层面巨大的AI生产率收益仅部分转化为已交付和已使用的软件。

35274.title: Factor Bias and Heterogeneous Output Quality in Multiproduct Production
35274.zh_title: 多产品生产中的要素偏向与异质性产出质量
35274.authors: Yi Lee, Shengyu Li, Mark J. Roberts
35274.abstract: This paper develops and estimates a structural model of multiproduct production that allows plant-product quality and factor-augmenting input efficiency. Using plant-level data from Taiwan’s textile industry, we specify a translog multiproduct cost function with input share and output supply equations and estimate the system of equations via GMM. The model recovers plant-specific input efficiencies, output qualities, economies of scale and scope, and substitution elasticities. It does not impose restrictions for non-joint production or input-output separability and does not require imputing product-level input allocations. We document increasing returns to scale, substitutability between labor and materials, and cost complementarities from joint production. Variation in labor shares and product mixes are jointly driven by large and persistent heterogeneity in both input efficiencies and output qualities. A multilateral productivity index shows that variation in input efficiency and output quality is the dominant source of productivity differences across plants.
35274.zh_abstract: 本文开发并估计了一个多产品生产的结构模型，该模型允许工厂-产品质量和要素增强型投入效率。使用台湾纺织业的工厂级数据，我们设定了一个包含投入份额和产出供给方程的超对数多产品成本函数，并通过GMM估计方程组。该模型恢复了工厂特定的投入效率、产出质量、规模经济和范围经济以及替代弹性。它不对非联合生产或投入-产出可分离性施加限制，也不需要估算产品层面的投入分配。我们记录了规模报酬递增、劳动力和材料之间的可替代性以及联合生产的成本互补性。劳动力份额和产品组合的变化是由投入效率和产出质量方面巨大且持久的异质性共同驱动的。一个多边生产率指数表明，投入效率和产出质量的变化是工厂间生产率差异的主要来源。

35273.title: The Growth and Performance of Artificial Intelligence in Asset Management
35273.zh_title: 资产管理中人工智能的增长与表现
35273.authors: Shuang Chen, Clemens Sialm, David X. Xu
35273.abstract: We examine the growth and performance of AI-driven investing. Using investment advisers' regulatory disclosures, labor market data, and fund strategy descriptions, we document that AI-driven investing has grown steadily since the early 2010s and is concentrated among hedge funds. AI hedge funds outperformed non-AI hedge funds in the early years, but this outperformance declined over time, even among early adopters. Contrary to concerns about AI-driven strategy homogeneity, AI hedge funds exhibit lower return comovement than non-AI peers. Our findings highlight both the alpha-generating potential and the limitations of AI as a source of investment performance.
35273.zh_abstract: 我们研究了人工智能驱动投资的增长与表现。利用投资顾问的监管披露、劳动力市场数据和基金策略描述，我们记录到自2010年代初以来，人工智能驱动投资稳步增长，且主要集中在对冲基金领域。早期，人工智能对冲基金的表现优于非人工智能对冲基金，但这种超额收益随时间推移而下降，即使在早期采用者中也是如此。与对人工智能驱动策略同质化的担忧相反，人工智能对冲基金表现出比非人工智能同行更低的回报联动性。我们的发现既凸显了人工智能作为投资绩效来源的阿尔法生成潜力，也揭示了其局限性。

35272.title: Geopolitical Fragmentation, Sovereign Debt, and Dollar Dominance
35272.zh_title: 地缘政治碎片化、主权债务与美元主导地位
35272.authors: Felipe Benguria, Eugenio I. Rojas, Felipe Saffie
35272.abstract: Countries borrow in dollars because dollar debt markets are deep and liquid. This paper develops a theory of when that dominance becomes fragile because countries have inherited dollar liabilities but increasingly earn yuan-linked revenues. In the model, countries begin with dollar-denominated sovereign debt. Geopolitical fragmentation raises their yuan revenue share through two channels: higher trade barriers with dollar-linked markets shift exports toward yuan-linked markets, and higher costs of using dollars in that trade make yuan settlement more attractive. Governments then face a choice: repay dollar debt using revenues that are less dollar-linked, default, or restructure into yuan. The paper identifies a liquidity spillover from restructuring: dollar-to-yuan restructurings deepen yuan debt markets, lowering refinancing costs and encouraging additional restructurings. The model shows when fragmentation produces limited restructuring and when it triggers a self-reinforcing shift from dollar debt to yuan debt. A cascade requires the liquidity feedback from yuan restructuring to be stronger than the dispersion in countries’ yuan revenue exposure.
35272.zh_abstract: 各国以美元借款，因为美元债务市场深度大、流动性强。本文发展了一个理论，探讨当各国继承了美元负债但收入日益与人民币挂钩时，这种主导地位何时变得脆弱。在模型中，各国最初持有以美元计价的主权债务。地缘政治碎片化通过两个渠道提高了它们的人民币收入份额：与美元挂钩市场的贸易壁垒提高，将出口转向人民币挂钩市场；以及在该贸易中使用美元的成本上升，使人民币结算更具吸引力。随后，政府面临选择：用与美元关联度较低的收入偿还美元债务、违约，或重组为人民币债务。本文识别了重组带来的流动性溢出效应：从美元到人民币的重组深化了人民币债务市场，降低了再融资成本，并鼓励了更多重组。模型展示了碎片化何时导致有限的重组，以及何时触发从美元债务向人民币债务的自我强化转变。这种级联效应要求人民币重组的流动性反馈强于各国人民币收入敞口的分散程度。

35271.title: Beyond Exposure: Predicting AI Adoption Based on Comparative Advantage
35271.zh_title: 超越暴露度：基于比较优势预测人工智能采用
35271.authors: Ilse Lindenlaub, Ryungha Oh, Maria Alejandra Rodriguez, Laura Veldkamp
35271.abstract: We document and explain the gap between measures of AI exposure and measures of AI adoption in the workplace. This leads us to propose a new AI adoption index based on comparative advantage. Using the representative German DiWaBe employee survey linked to worker and establishment information, we compare worker-reported AI use to prominent exposure measures and find that the relationship is weak. Motivated by this gap, we develop a framework in which adoption depends not only on technical feasibility (i.e., AI’s absolute advantage measured by exposure) but on profitability (i.e., AI’s comparative (dis)advantage relative to a specific worker), balancing AI productivity against AI user costs and worker productivity against wages. We operationalize this framework at the task level by (i) estimating worker productivity relative to pay, (ii) mapping exposure indices into AI productivity, and (iii) inferring task-specific AI user costs from revealed-preference adoption. The resulting occupation-level index accounts for almost 60% of cross-occupation variation in observed AI adoption, compared to 14% for an exposure-only model. The two approaches diverge substantially for approximately 30% of workers, highlighting that comparative advantage—not exposure alone—is crucial for assessing AI’s labor-market impact.
35271.zh_abstract: 我们记录并解释了工作场所中人工智能暴露度指标与人工智能采用指标之间的差距。这促使我们提出一个基于比较优势的新人工智能采用指数。利用具有代表性的德国DiWaBe员工调查数据（与工人和企业信息相关联），我们将工人报告的人工智能使用情况与著名的暴露度指标进行比较，发现两者关系较弱。受此差距启发，我们构建了一个框架，其中采用不仅取决于技术可行性（即由暴露度衡量的人工智能绝对优势），还取决于盈利能力（即人工智能相对于特定工人的比较（劣势）优势），平衡人工智能生产率与人工智能用户成本，以及工人生产率与工资。我们在任务层面操作化该框架，通过（i）估计工人相对于薪酬的生产率，（ii）将暴露度指数映射为人工智能生产率，以及（iii）从显示性偏好采用中推断任务特定的人工智能用户成本。由此产生的职业层面指数解释了观察到的跨职业人工智能采用差异的近60%，而仅基于暴露度的模型仅解释了14%。对于约30%的工人，这两种方法存在显著差异，这凸显了比较优势——而非仅暴露度——对于评估人工智能对劳动力市场影响至关重要。

35270.title: Dust in the Wind: The Health Costs of Great Salt Lake Desiccation
35270.zh_title: 风中之尘：大盐湖干涸的健康成本
35270.authors: Lena Harris, Eric C. Edwards, Danae Hernandez-Cortes
35270.abstract: Air pollution from natural sources is often subject to less regulatory oversight, but can still be caused by human activities. Understanding the role for policy requires quantifying the source's pollution contribution, for which there is currently no standard methodological approach. This paper uses the context of the shrinking Great Salt Lake in Utah to model air quality impacts of the highly erodible and growing area of exposed lakebed. Using four common identification strategies in the air pollution literature, and three alternative pollution measurement technologies, we find consistent evidence of meaningful pollution increases attributable to the shrinking lake in non-winter months. Estimates are relatively invariant to measurement technology but vary across identification strategies. Marginal annual costs range from $\$81$ to $\$175$ million per 100 km² of exposed lakebed. Scaling to the area of total exposed lakebed, annual desiccation-related health cost estimates range from $\$1.1$ billion to $\$2.3$ billion. Given the direct relationship between human water use in the basin and exposed lakebed, these results provide evidence for the cost-effectiveness of policies aimed at reducing consumptive water use.
35270.zh_abstract: 来自自然源的空气污染通常受到的监管监督较少，但仍可能由人类活动引起。理解政策的作用需要量化该源的污染贡献，但目前尚无标准方法论。本文利用犹他州大盐湖萎缩的背景，模拟高度易侵蚀且不断扩大的裸露湖床面积对空气质量的影响。使用空气污染文献中四种常见的识别策略以及三种替代污染测量技术，我们发现了在非冬季月份，湖泊萎缩导致污染显著增加的一致证据。估计值对测量技术相对不敏感，但不同识别策略间存在差异。边际年成本范围为每100平方公里裸露湖床8100万至1.75亿美元。按总裸露湖床面积推算，与干涸相关的年度健康成本估计在11亿至23亿美元之间。鉴于流域内人类用水与裸露湖床之间的直接关系，这些结果为旨在减少消耗性用水的政策的成本效益提供了证据。

35269.title: Frontier Knowledge in College and Student Success
35269.zh_title: 大学前沿知识与学生成功
35269.abstract: We study whether exposure to frontier knowledge in college affects student outcomes. Combining 459,415 syllabi from seven Texas public universities with 107 million publications and linked student records, we measure each course’s proximity to recent versus older research in its field. Exploiting syllabus updates unobserved at enrollment, we find that frontier exposure increases completion, GPA, graduate-school attendance, and earnings, and reduces time-to-degree. Completion, GPA, and progression gains are broad, while graduate-school and earnings returns are larger for students with stronger preparation and family resources. The evidence suggests two mechanisms: frontier content keeps students engaged, and sustained exposure builds labor-market skills.
35269.zh_abstract: 我们研究大学期间接触前沿知识是否影响学生成果。结合来自七所德克萨斯公立大学的459,415份教学大纲、1.07亿篇出版物以及关联的学生记录，我们衡量每门课程与其领域内近期研究相对于较旧研究的接近度。利用入学时未观察到的教学大纲更新，我们发现前沿接触提高了毕业率、平均绩点、研究生院入学率和收入，并缩短了毕业所需时间。毕业率、平均绩点和学业进展方面的收益是广泛的，而研究生院和收入回报对于准备更充分、家庭资源更丰富的学生更大。证据表明存在两种机制：前沿内容保持学生参与度，而持续接触则培养了劳动力市场技能。
35269.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I23, I24, I26, J24, O33

35268.title: An Unfunded Mandate? Medicaid Continuous Coverage Requirements and State Fiscal Burdens During COVID-19
35268.zh_title: 一项无资金支持的指令？新冠疫情期间医疗补助持续覆盖要求与州财政负担
35268.abstract: At the COVID-19 pandemic's onset, the federal government enacted substantial changes impacting both the revenues and expenditures connected to states' Medicaid programs through a pair of provisions in the March 2020 Families First Coronavirus Response Act. These included a 6.2 percentage point increase in states' Federal Medical Assistance Percentages (FMAP), which raised states' revenues, contingent on adherence to a continuous coverage requirement. The latter provision raised expenditures by preventing the disenrollment of individuals whose eligibility would otherwise have lapsed due to changes in income or other eligibility-relevant circumstances. While these provisions were ex-ante expected to result in expenditures and costs of similar magnitudes, the ex-post realizations remain unquantified. Nationwide, we estimate that states’ share of the continuous coverage provision's costs was $\$139.2$ billion, which is roughly $\$11.0$ billion less than the revenues states received, in aggregate, through increased FMAPs. Revenues and costs varied substantially across states, however, with costs exceeding revenues by as much as $\$594$ per capita, and revenues exceeding costs by as much as $\$838$ per capita. The baseline parameters governing the federal government's share of states' Medicaid expenditures emerge as a key driver of the extent to which the continuous coverage requirement can be viewed as an unfunded federal mandate.
35268.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情爆发之初，联邦政府通过2020年3月《家庭优先冠状病毒应对法案》中的两项条款，实施了影响各州医疗补助计划相关收入和支出的重大变革。这些条款包括将各州的联邦医疗援助百分比提高6.2个百分点，这增加了各州的收入，但前提是遵守持续覆盖要求。后一项条款通过阻止因收入或其他与资格相关情况变化而本应失去资格的个人退出保险，从而增加了支出。虽然这些条款事前预期会导致规模相近的支出和成本，但事后实现情况尚未量化。在全国范围内，我们估计各州承担的持续覆盖条款成本份额为1392亿美元，这比各州通过提高联邦医疗援助百分比获得的收入总额大约少110亿美元。然而，各州的收入和成本差异很大，成本超过收入的程度高达人均594美元，而收入超过成本的程度高达人均838美元。联邦政府承担各州医疗补助支出份额的基准参数，是决定持续覆盖要求在多大程度上可被视为一项无资金支持的联邦指令的关键驱动因素。
35268.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H70, H72, H75

35267.title: Persistent Effects of Early Academic Rank on Cognitive and Noncognitive Outcomes
35267.zh_title: 早期学业排名对认知与非认知结果的持续影响
35267.authors: Eunsik Chang, María Padilla-Romo, Cecilia Peluffo
35267.abstract: This paper estimates the effects of early academic rank in elementary school on later cognitive and noncognitive outcomes in the context of Mexico. We use linked administrative records to compare students with similar third-grade achievement but different ordinal positions. These rank differences arise from idiosyncratic variation in the achievement distributions of elementary-school cohorts. We find that a higher third-grade rank increases performance on a high-stakes high school admission exam. Both broader school-cohort rank and classroom rank contribute to this achievement gain when estimated jointly. Higher rank leads to more selective high school choices and improves self-reported measures of self-perception, academic aspirations, classroom responsibility, learning strategies, and teamwork attitudes by the end of ninth grade. We also provide evidence that higher elementary school rank improves students' high school placement outcomes.
35267.zh_abstract: 本文在墨西哥背景下估计了小学早期学业排名对后期认知和非认知结果的影响。我们使用关联的行政记录，比较三年级学业成绩相似但序数排名不同的学生。这些排名差异源于小学同年级学生成绩分布的特异性变化。我们发现，更高的三年级排名能提高高风险高中入学考试的成绩。当联合估计时，更广泛的学校年级排名和班级排名都对这一成绩提升有贡献。更高的排名导致更选择性的高中选择，并改善了九年级末自我报告的自感知、学业抱负、课堂责任感、学习策略和团队合作态度等指标。我们还提供了证据，表明更高的小学排名改善了学生的高中录取结果。

35266.title: The Missing Value of Data
35266.authors: Ankit Bhutani, Guillermo Ordoñez, Laura Veldkamp
35266.abstract: Data assets are increasingly vital in modern economies, yet macroeconomic measurement is not well-adapted to capturing their value. Part of the problem is that data is an intangible asset: investments in data are missed in national accounts, and depreciation losses are missed in firms’ balance sheets. Another part, unique to data, is that it serves as a means of payment in the modern economy: consumption bartered for data is also omitted from national accounts. We propose an output-based approach to measure the missing value of data. We treat data as an asset, measure its volume based on the quality of firms’ revenue forecasts, and endogenously determine its depreciation. We then capitalize the data value and explore what the measured GDP would be if the data were treated and transacted similarly to a physical asset. Our findings suggest that the aggregate value of data is about 1.5% of GDP.
35266.zh_abstract: 数据资产在现代经济中日益重要，但宏观经济计量并未很好地适应捕捉其价值。部分问题在于数据是一种无形资产：数据投资在国民账户中被遗漏，折旧损失在企业资产负债表中被遗漏。另一个独特的问题是，数据在现代经济中充当支付手段：为数据而交换的消费也被排除在国民账户之外。我们提出了一种基于产出的方法来衡量缺失的数据价值。我们将数据视为一种资产，根据企业收入预测的质量衡量其数量，并内生地确定其折旧。然后，我们对数据价值进行资本化，并探讨如果数据像实物资产一样被处理和交易，所测量的国内生产总值会是多少。我们的发现表明，数据的总价值约占国内生产总值的1.5%。
35266.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：C82, D80, E01, E22, O30, O47

35265.title: Off the Labor Supply Curve: The Zero Employer Size Wage Effect Within Large Firms
35265.zh_title: 脱离劳动力供给曲线：大型企业内部零雇主规模工资效应
35265.authors: André Diegmann, Steffen Müller, Benjamin Schoefer
35265.abstract: We revisit the employer size wage effect (ESWE)—arguably the most basic and influential departure from the law of one price for labor. Our main result is that this canonical fact disappears completely across establishments within the same firm, even though they operate in different local labor markets. We uncover and dissect this fact by including a firm fixed effect in otherwise standard cross-sectional regressions of wages on establishment size. We implement this demanding specification in population-wide triple-linked firm-establishment-employee data in Germany. This result is new in the ESWE literature (for which our paper also provides the first systematic meta-analysis). This wage-size decoupling is hard to square with the view that employment is determined along a finitely elastic employer-specific labor supply curve—i.e., employers pay exactly the minimum needed for the quantity of labor, but no more—the foundation of the monopsony view. By contrast, large multi-establishment firms (MEF) appear to hire off their labor supply curves (or those curves are very elastic), pay wage premia above the monopsonistic minimum, and leave excess labor supply. We find some evidence for a reemergence of the ESWE within low-premium MEFs. Overall, at least for the 25% of German employment in large firms for which the ESWE disappears, wage setting and employment determination may be better accounted for by alternative models, namely accommodating above-market-clearing wage premia and rationing of labor supply, such as efficiency wage theories.
35265.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了雇主规模工资效应（ESWE）——这可以说是对劳动力单一价格法则最基本且最具影响力的背离。我们的主要发现是，这一经典事实在同一企业的不同分支机构之间完全消失，尽管这些分支机构在不同的地方劳动力市场运营。我们通过将企业固定效应纳入原本标准的、对工资与机构规模进行横截面回归的模型中，揭示并剖析了这一事实。我们在德国覆盖全人口的企业-机构-员工三级关联数据中实施了这一要求严格的设定。这一结果在ESWE文献中是全新的（本文也为此提供了首次系统的元分析）。这种工资与规模的脱钩很难与以下观点相协调：即就业是由一条有限弹性的、雇主特定的劳动力供给曲线决定的——也就是说，雇主恰好支付劳动力数量所需的最低工资，但不会更多——这是买方垄断观点的基石。相比之下，大型多机构企业（MEF）似乎是在其劳动力供给曲线之外雇佣劳动力（或者这些曲线非常有弹性），支付高于买方垄断最低水平的工资溢价，并留下过剩的劳动力供给。我们发现在低溢价MEF内部，ESWE有重新出现的证据。总体而言，至少对于ESWE消失的大型企业（占德国就业的25%）而言，工资设定和就业决定可能更好地由替代模型来解释，即容纳高于市场出清的工资溢价和劳动力供给配给，例如效率工资理论。
35265.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E2, E20, J2, J3, M50

35264.title: Where There’s Smoke: Stochastic Caregiving Shocks and Mothers’ Labor Market Outcomes
35264.zh_title: 有烟之处：随机照料冲击与母亲的劳动力市场结果
35264.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Seunghoon Lee
35264.abstract: Formal childcare and public schooling are widely understood to be central to mothers’ labor market attachment. Yet, a large literature finds that even substantial expansions of formal childcare produce modest or null effects on maternal employment. We study the role of stochastic caregiving demand shocks that cause childcare constraints to bind intermittently even when formal care is available. Using plausibly exogenous variation in wildfire smoke exposure, we show that smoke increases school closures and student absenteeism, generating caregiving demand. Further, by comparing mothers whose youngest child varies in reliance on school-based childcare, we find that these shocks impose substantial contemporaneous costs and, when accumulated, reduce employment. Employment losses are fully offset among mothers working outside male-dominated industries, consistent with workplace tolerance moderating the consequences of intermittent caregiving demands.
35264.zh_abstract: 正规儿童保育和公立学校被广泛认为对母亲的劳动力市场依附至关重要。然而，大量文献发现，即使是大幅扩展正规儿童保育，对母亲就业的影响也微乎其微或为零。我们研究了随机照料需求冲击的作用，这些冲击导致即使在有正规保育的情况下，儿童保育约束也会间歇性地收紧。利用野火烟雾暴露的合理外生变化，我们表明烟雾增加了学校关闭和学生缺勤，从而产生了照料需求。此外，通过比较其最小子女对学校保育依赖程度不同的母亲，我们发现这些冲击带来了巨大的同期成本，并且当累积起来时，会减少就业。在非男性主导行业工作的母亲中，就业损失被完全抵消，这与工作场所的容忍度调节了间歇性照料需求后果的观点一致。

35263.title: How Efficient was the Affordable Care Act at Reducing Uninsured Rates?
35263.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》在降低无保险率方面的效率如何？
35263.abstract: One way to measure the efficiency of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) is the extent to which gains in publicly supported health insurance reduced uninsured rates. Using data from the 2008–2024 American Community Survey, we examine time trends in rates of uninsured, public insurance coverage, and employer-sponsored insurance (ESI) by groups defined by the ratio of income to the Federal Poverty Line (FPL). We obtain estimates of associations between changes in public coverage and changes in uninsured and ESI exploiting state-by-year variation in ACA implementation. Importantly, we estimate the total effect of the ACA—including both the Medicaid expansion and Marketplace coverage—on uninsured and ESI rates. For adults in households below 150% of the federal poverty level (FPL), increases in public insurance coverage were associated with one-for-one decrease in uninsured and no change in ESI. For adults with incomes between 151%–400% FPL, each percentage point increase in public coverage was associated with about a 0.6 percentage point decrease in uninsured and a 0.4 decrease, or crowd out, in ESI. Crowd-out was larger among groups with higher pre-ACA ESI rates such as parents and married adults. Using variation from the Medicaid expansion alone to evaluate the ACA’s effect on ESI leads to overstating crowd-out among low-income adults (below 150% FPL) and understating crowd-out among higher-income adults (above 250% FPL). Our findings suggest that policies intended to subsidize health insurance of higher income groups, for example, the enhanced premium subsidies, are far less efficient than policies intended to further expand public insurance to low-income groups, for example, in non-expansion states.
35263.zh_abstract: 衡量《平价医疗法案》（ACA）效率的一种方法是，公共支持的健康保险覆盖面的增加在多大程度上降低了无保险率。利用2008-2024年美国社区调查的数据，我们按收入与联邦贫困线（FPL）的比率定义的群体，考察了无保险率、公共保险覆盖率和雇主提供的保险（ESI）的时间趋势。我们利用各州在ACA实施上的逐年差异，估计了公共保险覆盖率变化与无保险率和ESI变化之间的关联。重要的是，我们估计了ACA的总效应——包括医疗补助扩展和市场覆盖——对无保险率和ESI的影响。对于家庭收入低于联邦贫困线150%的成年人，公共保险覆盖率的增加与无保险率的一对一减少相关，而ESI没有变化。对于收入在联邦贫困线151%-400%之间的成年人，公共保险覆盖率每增加一个百分点，与无保险率约0.6个百分点的下降和ESI约0.4个百分点的下降（即挤出效应）相关。在ACA实施前ESI率较高的群体中，如父母和已婚成年人，挤出效应更大。仅利用医疗补助扩展的变异来评估ACA对ESI的影响，会导致夸大低收入成年人（低于150% FPL）的挤出效应，并低估高收入成年人（高于250% FPL）的挤出效应。我们的发现表明，旨在补贴较高收入群体健康保险的政策（例如，增强型保费补贴）的效率远低于旨在进一步向低收入群体扩展公共保险的政策（例如，在非扩展州）。

35262.title: How Much and How Fast Do Investors Respond to Equity Premium Changes? Evidence from Wealth Taxation
35262.zh_title: 投资者对股权溢价变化的反应程度和速度有多快？来自财富税的证据
35262.authors: Andreas Fagereng, Luigi Guiso, Marius A. K. Ring
35262.abstract: Using administrative panel data on Norwegian investors’ portfolios, we document strong but slow portfolio allocation responses to a persistent wealth-tax-induced shock to the equity premium. Short-run responses resemble the modest sensitivity documented using surveys. The longer-run responses are much larger and can be rationalized by moderate risk aversion. We document that equity premium shocks affect stock market entry but not exits, suggesting that entry costs dominate participation costs. Our finding of slow responses supports the asset-pricing literature that uses adjustment frictions to explain important asset-pricing puzzles, and has implications for optimal capital taxation when tax rates differ across assets.
35262.zh_abstract: 利用挪威投资者投资组合的行政面板数据，我们记录了投资者对由持久性财富税引起的股权溢价冲击的强烈但缓慢的投资组合配置反应。短期反应类似于通过调查记录的适度敏感性。长期反应则大得多，并且可以通过适度的风险厌恶来合理化。我们记录了股权溢价冲击影响股市进入但不影响退出，这表明进入成本主导了参与成本。我们发现反应缓慢的结论支持了利用调整摩擦来解释重要资产定价谜题的资产定价文献，并且对当不同资产的税率不同时的最优资本税具有启示意义。
35262.meta: Programs：AP, PE；JEL：G11, G5, G51, H20, H31

35261.title: Startups in Africa
35261.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Marcio Cruz, Mariana Pereira-Lopez, Tommaso Porzio, Chun Zhao
35261.abstract: We build new data on startups in Africa to study which types of financing these firms demand, how financing is allocated in practice, and the implications for startup creation and the composition of the sector. We combine a continent-wide founder survey, an incentive-compatible experiment estimating financing preferences, and venture capital (VC) deal records matched to founders’ education and work histories. We find that startups strongly prefer equity over debt, but equity is supplied mainly by foreign investors and flows disproportionately to foreign-connected founders. About 80 percent of VC deals involve a foreign investor, and more than 60 percent of funded founders have studied or worked outside Africa. A simple accounting framework shows that this foreignness reflects three main forces: scarce local equity capital, a thin pool of local entrepreneurs able to access startup finance, and frictions limiting local entrepreneurs’ access to foreign investors. Together, these forces reduce startup creation and tilt the sector toward foreign investors and foreign-connected founders.
35261.zh_abstract: 我们构建了关于非洲初创企业的新数据，以研究这些企业需要哪些类型的融资、融资在实践中是如何分配的，以及对初创企业创建和该行业构成的影响。我们结合了一项覆盖整个非洲大陆的创始人调查、一项估计融资偏好的激励相容实验，以及匹配了创始人教育背景和工作经历的风险投资（VC）交易记录。我们发现，初创企业强烈偏好股权而非债务，但股权主要由外国投资者提供，并且不成比例地流向具有海外背景的创始人。大约80%的风险投资交易涉及外国投资者，超过60%获得融资的创始人曾在非洲以外学习或工作。一个简单的核算框架表明，这种“外国性”反映了三个主要力量：稀缺的本地股权资本、能够获得初创企业融资的本地企业家群体薄弱，以及限制本地企业家接触外国投资者的摩擦。这些力量共同减少了初创企业的创建，并使该行业向外国投资者和具有海外背景的创始人倾斜。
35261.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, ED, EFG, IFM, LE, LS, POL, PR；JEL：F0, G0, O10

35260.title: The Risk-free Rate and the Risk-adjusted Growth Rate
35260.zh_title: 无风险利率与风险调整后的增长率
35260.abstract: Several important questions — such as the possibility of debt-rollover without primary surpluses — turn on whether the present value of the aggregate endowment is finite, i.e., whether the economic growth rate under the “risk-neutral” measure, lies below the risk-free rate. It is tempting to argue that the endowment must be finitely valued, since there exist finitely-valued, non-depreciating assets whose cash flows are cointegrated with aggregate output. This paper shows why this argument is incorrect. A remarkable historical episode in which French government bonds were indexed to aggregate growth allows direct measurement of the risk-adjusted growth rate, which is found to exceed the risk-free rate.
35260.zh_abstract: 几个重要问题——例如在没有基本盈余的情况下进行债务展期的可能性——取决于总禀赋的现值是否有限，即“风险中性”测度下的经济增长率是否低于无风险利率。人们很容易认为总禀赋的估值必然是有限的，因为存在估值有限且不折旧的资产，其现金流与总产出是协整的。本文说明了为什么这个论点是不正确的。一个值得注意的历史事件——法国政府债券与总体增长挂钩——使得直接测量风险调整后的增长率成为可能，结果发现该增长率超过了无风险利率。
35260.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, PE；JEL：E60, G1, G12, H60

35259.title: A Bayesian Critic for Frequentist Procedures
35259.zh_title: 频率学派方法的贝叶斯批评者
35259.authors: Isaiah Andrews, Simon C. Essig Aberg, Jesse M. Shapiro
35259.abstract: We propose a method for automated, probabilistic evaluation of the frequentist properties (e.g., bias, coverage) of procedures (e.g., estimators, confidence intervals) in a given setting. A Bayesian critic observes a sample of data and updates their prior belief on the underlying data-generating process (DGP). The resulting posterior belief about the DGP implies a posterior belief about the property of interest. When the critic's prior is in a low-precision Dirichlet process class, the critic's posterior can be approximated via a Bayesian bootstrap, making the method fully automated. We apply the method to several canonical settings and show that the critic shares some concerns raised in previous work and delivers new insights.
35259.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种方法，用于在给定设定下对程序（例如，估计量、置信区间）的频率学派性质（例如，偏差、覆盖率）进行自动化的概率评估。一个贝叶斯批评者观察数据样本，并更新其对潜在数据生成过程（DGP）的先验信念。由此产生的关于DGP的后验信念意味着关于感兴趣性质的后验信念。当批评者的先验属于低精度狄利克雷过程类时，批评者的后验可以通过贝叶斯自助法来近似，从而使该方法完全自动化。我们将该方法应用于几个经典设定，并表明批评者分享了先前工作中提出的一些担忧，并提供了新的见解。
35259.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, POL, TWP；JEL：C11, C15, C18

35258.title: Towards a Methodology for Measuring Rental Property Ownership in the United States
35258.zh_title: 迈向衡量美国租赁房产所有权的方法论
35258.authors: Stephanie Kestelman, Rebecca Diamond, John Eric Humphries, Kate Pennington, Winnie van Dijk, John L. Voorheis
35258.abstract: Roughly one-third of U.S. households rent their homes, yet measuring who owns rental property is difficult: ownership is frequently obscured by LLCs, partnerships, and other intermediary entities that separate legal from economic control. We develop a method that traces ownership through administrative records — combining deeds and property assessments with the Census Bureau's Business Register, IRS Schedule K-1 filings, and SEC filings on REITs — to identify ultimate owners and construct property portfolios across the full landlord size distribution. Applying the method to 11 large CBSAs, we find that individual landlords own a large majority of rental units, though their share varies meaningfully across markets. We also show that the widely used mailing-address aggregation approach both under- and over-states portfolio size in systematic ways. The method is designed to scale to national coverage and to support measurement of landlord identity, portfolio composition, and ownership concentration in U.S. rental markets. We also discuss the method's current limitations and outline directions for refinement and validation.
35258.zh_abstract: 大约三分之一的美国住户租房居住，然而衡量谁拥有租赁房产却很困难：所有权经常被有限责任公司（LLC）、合伙企业和其他中介实体所掩盖，这些实体将法律控制权与经济控制权分离开来。我们开发了一种通过行政记录追溯所有权的方法——将契约和房产评估与人口普查局的商业登记册、国税局附表K-1申报表以及美国证券交易委员会关于房地产投资信托基金（REIT）的申报文件相结合——以识别最终所有者，并构建涵盖整个房东规模分布的房产组合。将该方法应用于11个大型大都市统计区（CBSA），我们发现个人房东拥有绝大多数租赁单元，尽管他们的份额在不同市场之间存在显著差异。我们还表明，广泛使用的邮寄地址聚合方法会以系统性的方式低估和高估投资组合规模。该方法旨在扩展到全国覆盖范围，并支持衡量美国租赁市场中的房东身份、投资组合构成和所有权集中度。我们还讨论了该方法当前的局限性，并概述了改进和验证的方向。

35257.title: The Federal Government's Discretionary Spending
35257.zh_title: 联邦政府的可自由支配支出
35257.authors: Karen Dynan, Douglas Elmendorf, Theresa Gullo
35257.abstract: This paper examines federal discretionary spending, including its place in the overall budget, its composition, and the economic and political forces shaping its size. Both defense and nondefense discretionary spending show no trend relative to national output over the past three decades, reflecting underlying factors rather than explicit targets. This stability implies a less favorable fiscal outlook than appears in official projections. Because discretionary spending is generally set annually, it will face continuing pressure from concerns about rising federal debt, a challenge compounded by the erosion of the structured budget process envisioned in the Budget Act fifty years ago.
35257.zh_abstract: 本文考察了联邦可自由支配支出，包括其在整体预算中的地位、构成，以及影响其规模的经济和政治力量。过去三十年来，国防和非国防可自由支配支出相对于国民产出均未呈现趋势性变化，这反映了潜在因素而非明确目标的作用。这种稳定性意味着财政前景比官方预测所显示的要更为不利。由于可自由支配支出通常每年设定一次，它将持续面临来自对不断上升的联邦债务的担忧所带来的压力，而五十年前《预算法》所设想的结构化预算程序的侵蚀又加剧了这一挑战。

35256.title: Housing Capital and Intergenerational Mobility in the United States
35256.zh_title: 美国的住房资本与代际流动性
35256.authors: Ariel J. Binder, Max Risch, John L. Voorheis
35256.abstract: We document the intergenerational mobility of housing capital in the United States using a new dataset linking Decennial Census data to administrative property and income-tax records for over 3.4 million families. We find that housing capital is substantially more persistent across generations than earnings. Moreover, the gap in housing capital between White and Black children widens sharply across the parental distribution, more so than the earnings gap. Using a capital accumulation and transmission framework, we study how assets and earnings jointly shape intergenerational housing capital persistence. Less than half of this persistence operates through children's earnings, leaving substantial scope for direct transmissions of capital assets and knowledge. Differences in earnings explain most of the White-Black housing gap at the bottom of the parental distribution, but less than half at the top. Finally, we present quasi-experimental evidence that local housing supply constraints amplify intergenerational persistence by widening homeownership gaps between children from lower- and higher-resource families. Together, our findings indicate that economic resources are more concentrated across generations than studies focused on income alone would imply.
35256.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个将十年一次的人口普查数据与超过340万个家庭的行政财产和所得税记录联系起来的新数据集，记录了美国住房资本的代际流动性。我们发现，住房资本在代际间的持续性远高于收入。此外，白人和黑人子女之间的住房资本差距在父母分布中急剧扩大，其程度超过收入差距。利用一个资本积累和传递框架，我们研究了资产和收入如何共同塑造代际住房资本的持续性。这种持续性中只有不到一半是通过子女的收入起作用的，这为资本资产和知识的直接传递留下了相当大的空间。收入差异解释了父母分布底层白人与黑人住房差距的大部分，但在顶层则解释了不到一半。最后，我们提供了准实验证据，表明地方住房供给约束通过扩大来自低资源和高资源家庭子女之间的住房拥有率差距，加剧了代际持续性。总之，我们的发现表明，经济资源在代际间的集中程度比仅关注收入的研究所暗示的要高。

35255.title: Deep-Tech Innovation: A Multi-Method Study toward a Conceptual Framework and Research Agenda
35255.zh_title: 深度技术创新：迈向概念框架与研究议程的多方法研究
35255.authors: Johann Kortsch, Stefan Raff-Heinen, David Bendig, Martin Murmann, Colin Schulz, Fiona Murray
35255.abstract: The term “deep-tech innovation” has attracted growing attention in research, policy, and practice, but it is applied inconsistently and lacks an agreed-upon definition. This limits cumulative knowledge building and blurs how deep-tech innovation relates to adjacent concepts. We address this gap by developing a framework that treats deep-tech innovation as a distinct object of inquiry. Using a multi-method design that combines a systematic, integrative, concept-centric literature review and semi-structured interviews with deep-tech founders, we identify twelve defining attributes structured across three levels: invention, venture, and ecosystem. At the invention level (the conceptual core), we specify six attributes: three foundational attributes that capture the scientific and technological basis of the invention, and three attributes that describe its characteristic exposure profile. The remaining six attributes capture recurring implications at the venture level (staged financing strategies, dual scientific and commercial maturation, and the multidisciplinary broadening of teams) and the ecosystem level (multi-actor interactions, specialized incubation support, and industrial de-risking and scaling partnerships). We use this framework to delineate the boundaries of deep-tech innovation, distinguish it from adjacent concepts, and propose an agenda for future research.
35255.zh_abstract: “深度技术创新”一词在研究、政策和实践中日益受到关注，但其应用不一致且缺乏公认的定义。这限制了知识的累积性构建，并模糊了深度技术创新与相关概念之间的关系。我们通过开发一个将深度技术创新视为独特研究对象的框架来填补这一空白。采用结合系统性、整合性、以概念为中心的文献综述与对深度技术创始人的半结构化访谈的多方法设计，我们识别出十二个定义性属性，这些属性结构化为三个层面：发明、企业和生态系统。在发明层面（概念核心），我们指定了六个属性：三个基础属性，捕捉发明的科学和技术基础；以及三个属性，描述其特征性风险暴露概况。其余六个属性捕捉了在企业层面（分阶段融资策略、科学与商业双重成熟、团队的多学科扩展）和生态系统层面（多主体互动、专业化孵化支持、以及产业去风险与规模化合作伙伴关系）的反复出现的含义。我们利用这一框架来界定深度技术创新的边界，将其与相邻概念区分开来，并提出了未来研究的议程。

35254.title: Defining Innovatisation: The Case of NewSpace and the Changing Space Sector
35254.zh_title: 定义“创新化”：以新航天与不断变化的航天部门为例
35254.authors: Benoit Cornet, Marc-André Chavy-Macdonald, Dominique Foray
35254.abstract: The space sector has become far more dynamic and innovative, with new actors (e.g., start-ups, venture capital) entering and the ever-growing importance of private firms. In this paper we introduce a novel concept, innovatisation, to understand this phenomenon. Innovatisation describes the transformation of a sector between two modes. In a mode of technological achievements (TA), only technological (not economic) performance matters, primarily for prestige purposes; in innovation, customer preferences, commercial opportunities, and costs become essential. Studying the economics of Apollo and the commercialization attempts of the 1980s, we show how the space sector has long featured a logic of TA. Then, analyzing recent trends, we provide quantitative empirical evidence (e.g., costs) that innovation now shapes the sector, thanks to various driving forces. The driving forces behind the innovatisation process are identified building on Jones (2022) and the disruptive innovation theory.
35254.zh_abstract: 航天部门已变得更具活力和创新性，新参与者（如初创企业、风险资本）进入，私营企业的重要性日益增长。在本文中，我们引入了一个新概念——“创新化”，以理解这一现象。创新化描述了一个部门在两种模式之间的转型。在技术成就模式下，只有技术（而非经济）表现重要，主要出于声望目的；而在创新模式下，客户偏好、商业机会和成本变得至关重要。通过研究阿波罗计划的经济学和1980年代的商业化尝试，我们展示了航天部门长期以来如何以技术成就逻辑为特征。然后，通过分析近期趋势，我们提供了定量经验证据（例如成本），表明由于各种驱动力的作用，创新现在正在塑造该部门。创新化过程背后的驱动力是基于Jones (2022)和颠覆性创新理论来识别的。

35299.title: Characterizing the File Drawer: Evidence from a Meta-Analysis of Parent-Interventions Around the World
35299.zh_title: 描述文件抽屉：基于全球家长干预措施元分析的证据
35299.abstract: We conduct a meta-analysis of 82 randomized controlled trials across more than 20 countries to estimate the effects of low-cost, remote parental engagement interventions delivered through text messages, phone calls, and apps. We estimate a joint likelihood function that incorporates both written studies and unwritten studies identified through trial registries, funder records, research labs, evidence clearinghouses, and other sources. By also recording sample sizes for unwritten studies, the model estimates the distribution of standard errors, identifies write-up probabilities conditional on significance, and characterizes the file drawer by estimating effect distributions for written and unwritten studies. Bias-corrected effects are 0.05 SD for test scores, 0.07 SD for grades, 0.05 SD for attendance, and 0.03 SD for enrollment. In the best-identified domain, test scores, statistically insignificant results are still written up at high rates. We also find that larger studies tend to estimate smaller latent effects, which could indicate that true effects are correlated with study precision, violating a common meta-analysis assumption. In smaller-sample domains, our approach helps identify selection probabilities by anchoring the absolute write-up rates. Finally, we estimate the value of additional RCTs to inform adoption decisions. Any single study estimate is unlikely to dissuade adoption because parent interventions have high marginal value of public funds. Instead, future research is most valuable when it can explain heterogeneity across settings.
35299.zh_abstract: 我们对来自20多个国家的82项随机对照试验进行了元分析，以估计通过短信、电话和应用程序提供的低成本、远程家长参与干预措施的效果。我们估计了一个联合似然函数，该函数同时包含了通过试验注册库、资助方记录、研究实验室、证据信息交换所和其他来源识别的已撰写研究和未撰写研究。通过同时记录未撰写研究的样本量，该模型估计了标准误的分布，识别了基于显著性水平的撰写概率，并通过估计已撰写和未撰写研究的效应分布来描述文件抽屉。偏差校正后的效应为：考试成绩0.05个标准差，成绩0.07个标准差，出勤率0.05个标准差，入学率0.03个标准差。在识别效果最好的领域——考试成绩中，统计上不显著的结果仍然以高比率被撰写。我们还发现，较大的研究倾向于估计较小的潜在效应，这可能表明真实效应与研究精度相关，违反了元分析的一个常见假设。在样本量较小的领域，我们的方法通过锚定绝对撰写率来帮助识别选择概率。最后，我们估计了额外随机对照试验的价值，以为采纳决策提供信息。任何单一研究的估计都不太可能阻止采纳，因为家长干预措施具有较高的公共资金边际价值。相反，当未来研究能够解释不同环境下的异质性时，其价值最大。
35299.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, PE；JEL：H43, I20, I21, I24

35298.title: Does Regional Variation in Wage Levels Identify the Effects of a National Minimum Wage?
35298.zh_title: 工资水平的地区差异能否识别全国最低工资的影响？
35298.abstract: This paper asks whether regional wage differences can identify the effects of a national minimum wage. I study two common exposure-based approaches: effective-minimum-wage designs, which compare the minimum wage to contemporaneous local wages, and fraction-affected/gap designs, which measure pre-reform exposure to the new minimum. Using theory, simulations, and evidence from Brazil, I show when these approaches can mislead and how their performance depends on specification choices. The results lead to practical recommendations for applied researchers, including when to avoid these designs, how to test their assumptions, which specifications are more reliable, and how similar concerns may apply to other settings.
35298.zh_abstract: 本文探讨地区工资差异能否用于识别全国最低工资的影响。我研究了两种常见的基于暴露程度的方法：有效最低工资设计（将最低工资与同期当地工资进行比较）和受影响比例/缺口设计（衡量改革前对新最低工资的暴露程度）。利用理论、模拟和来自巴西的证据，我展示了这些方法何时可能产生误导，以及它们的表现如何取决于规格选择。研究结果为应用研究人员提供了实用建议，包括何时应避免这些设计、如何检验其假设、哪些规格更可靠，以及类似问题可能如何适用于其他情境。

35297.title: Macroeconomic and Fiscal Consequences of Quantitative Easing
35297.zh_title: 量化宽松的宏观经济与财政后果
35297.authors: Tobias Adrian, Christopher Erceg, Marcin Kolasa, Jesper Lindé, Pawel Zabczyk
35297.abstract: Quantitative easing (QE) has been criticized for helping fuel the post-COVID inflation boom and causing large central bank losses. In this paper, we argue that QE should be evaluated mainly on its ability to achieve core macro-objectives as well for its effects on the consolidated fiscal position of the government and central bank, although central bank losses can matter to the extent that they may weaken central bank credibility. Using a DSGE model with segmented asset markets, we show how QE can provide a sizeable boost to output and inflation in a deep liquidity trap and can reduce public debt substantially. This contrasts to the rise in public debt that occurs under fiscal expansion and makes QE an attractive tool in a high debt environment. There is more reason for caution in using QE in a "shallow" liquidity trap in which the notional interest rate is only slightly negative: QE runs more risk of causing the economy to overheat, especially if forward guidance has a strong element of commitment, and is more likely to generate sizeable central bank losses. Some refinements in strategy, including the use of escape clauses, can help mitigate overheating risks.
35297.zh_abstract: 量化宽松（QE）因助长后疫情通胀繁荣并导致央行巨额亏损而受到批评。在本文中，我们认为，评估QE主要应依据其实现核心宏观目标的能力，以及其对政府和央行合并财政状况的影响，尽管央行亏损在可能削弱央行可信度的程度上也很重要。利用一个具有分割资产市场的DSGE模型，我们展示了QE如何在深度流动性陷阱中显著提振产出和通胀，并能大幅减少公共债务。这与财政扩张下公共债务上升形成对比，使得QE在高债务环境下成为一种有吸引力的工具。在名义利率仅略为负的“浅层”流动性陷阱中使用QE则更需谨慎：QE更有可能导致经济过热，特别是当前瞻指引具有强烈的承诺成分时，并且更可能产生可观的央行亏损。策略上的一些改进，包括使用例外条款，有助于缓解过热风险。
35297.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C54, E1, E3, E5, G12

35296.title: GLP-1 Therapy and the Reshaping of Socioeconomic Gradients in Health
35296.zh_title: GLP-1疗法与健康社会经济梯度的重塑
35296.authors: J. Felipe Montano-Campos, Bryan Tysinger, Dana Goldman, Darius N. Lakdawalla
35296.abstract: GLP-1 therapies for obesity promise substantial health improvements, but little is known about how their benefits vary across socioeconomic and demographic groups. Using a nationally representative microsimulation model of US adults and Shapely-value decomposition, we estimate the lifetime health and economic benefits of GLP-1 treatment and examine how those gains vary across individuals. The largest differences emerge across education. Individuals with less than a high school education experience experience roughly 14% higher gains in lifetime net social value, 16-17% larger improvements in discounted generalized risk- and severity-adjusted life-years (GRASA-QALYs), and 20% greater increases in life expectancy relative to the cohort mean, whereas individuals with college degrees experience gains 15-27% below the mean across these outcomes. Black and Hispanic individuals also tend to experience larger improvements in health outcomes and social value than White individuals, including larger gains in GRASA-QALYs and life expectancy and larger reductions in diabetes risk and duration. Females likewise experience larger predicted treatment gains than men. These patterns are consistent with the idea that the largest gains arise among populations facing greater socioeconomic constraints in sustaining behavioral weight control. GLP-1 innovation may therefore mitigate inequality in obesity-related disease and survival, advancing equity in population health.
35296.zh_abstract: 用于治疗肥胖的GLP-1疗法有望带来显著的健康改善，但关于其益处如何在不同社会经济和人口群体间分布，我们知之甚少。利用一个具有全国代表性的美国成年人微观模拟模型和沙普利值分解，我们估计了GLP-1治疗带来的终生健康和经济收益，并考察了这些收益在不同个体间的差异。最大的差异出现在教育水平上。与队列平均值相比，受教育程度低于高中水平的个体在终生净社会价值上的收益高出约14%，在贴现的广义风险与严重程度调整生命年上的改善高出16-17%，在预期寿命上的增加高出20%；而拥有大学学位的个体在这些结果上的收益则低于平均值15-27%。黑人和西班牙裔个体在健康结果和社会价值方面的改善也往往大于白人个体，包括在广义风险与严重程度调整生命年和预期寿命上获得更大收益，以及在糖尿病风险和病程上实现更大降低。女性预测的治疗收益也大于男性。这些模式与以下观点一致：最大收益出现在那些在维持行为体重控制方面面临更大社会经济约束的人群中。因此，GLP-1创新可能减轻肥胖相关疾病和生存方面的不平等，促进人口健康公平。
35296.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：C63, D63, I12, I14, I18, O33

35295.title: Predicting Labor Force Types
35295.authors: Rui Castro, Jiyoung Kim, Fabian Lange, Jérôme Larivière, Markus Poschke
35295.abstract: A small group of people accounts for a large majority of flows between labor market states and of spells in un- and non-employment. In this paper, we ask whether it is possible to identify those weakly attached to the labor market during their prime working-age years using information available early in their lives. First, we use information on labor force transitions between ages 30 and 50 contained in the long panel provided by the NLSY79 to identify those weakly connected to the labor market during their prime age. To do so, we use k-means clustering on moments describing observed spells in employment, unemployment, and non-employment between 30 and 50. This points to a group of less attached individuals who are disproportionally female, less educated, and in poor health. In a second step we predict, using information collected at various points before age 30—which we do not use in clustering—whether individuals will turn out to belong to the weakly attached type in their prime age. We find that information from ages 22 to 29 allows predicting membership of the low-attachment group with high precision. Particularly influential is information on early labor market experiences and health. The fact that we can predict weak and strong labor market attachment during prime working age using variables observed in individuals’ twenties suggests the presence of persistent heterogeneity that shapes labor market experiences throughout the life cycle.
35295.zh_abstract: 一小部分人占据了劳动力市场状态之间流动的绝大部分，以及失业和非就业状态的绝大部分持续时间。在本文中，我们探讨是否可以利用个人早期生活中的可用信息，来识别那些在黄金工作年龄期间与劳动力市场联系薄弱的人。首先，我们利用NLSY79提供的长面板数据中30至50岁之间的劳动力市场转换信息，来识别在黄金年龄期间与劳动力市场联系薄弱的人。为此，我们对描述30至50岁期间观察到的就业、失业和非就业状态的矩进行k-means聚类分析。这指向了一组联系较弱的个体，他们不成比例地是女性、受教育程度较低且健康状况较差。第二步，我们利用30岁之前不同时间点收集的信息（这些信息未用于聚类），来预测个体在黄金年龄是否会属于联系薄弱的类型。我们发现，22至29岁的信息能够高精度地预测低联系群体的归属。特别有影响力的信息是早期的劳动力市场经历和健康状况。我们能够利用个人二十多岁时观察到的变量来预测黄金工作年龄期间劳动力市场联系的强弱，这一事实表明存在持续的异质性，这种异质性塑造了整个生命周期的劳动力市场经历。

35294.title: Measuring Housing Quality Using Revealed Preference: A Geographic PageRank Approach
35294.zh_title: 利用显示性偏好衡量住房质量：一种地理PageRank方法
35294.authors: Alex Bell, Sophie Calder-Wang, Shusheng Zhong
35294.abstract: This paper introduces Geographic PageRank (GPR), an innovative measure of place quality that is based on migration decisions, employing a recursive algorithm that leverages the full network of migration flows. Using various public data sources, we construct GPR rankings for U.S. counties and metropolitan areas. We also extend the rankings to capture changes over time and differences for population subgroups, providing a versatile data product. As an application, we show that GPR can serve as an "anti-instrument'' for unobserved housing quality when pricing environmental amenities, recovering a correctly signed implicit price of air pollution that is in line with quasi-experimental benchmarks.
35294.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了地理PageRank（GPR），这是一种基于迁移决策的地点质量创新性衡量指标，采用递归算法，利用了完整的迁移流网络。利用各种公共数据源，我们构建了美国县和都市区的GPR排名。我们还将排名扩展到捕捉随时间的变化以及人口子群体的差异，提供了一种多功能的数据产品。作为一个应用，我们表明，在对环境舒适度进行定价时，GPR可以作为未观测住房质量的“反工具变量”，从而恢复出与准实验基准一致的正确符号的空气污染隐含价格。
35294.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：C30, C39, Q5, Q53, R3, R31, R32

35293.title: The Effect of Height on Adolescents' Body Image Perceptions and Behaviors
35293.zh_title: 身高对青少年身体形象认知与行为的影响
35293.authors: Monica Deza, Neiva J. Fortes, Maria Zhu
35293.abstract: This paper estimates the causal effect of height on adolescents’ body image, encompassing self-perceptions of weight, the accuracy of those perceptions, and weight-management aspirations.
