Using data from the National Longitudinal Survey of Youth 1997 (NLSY97), we leverage within-individual variation in height during adolescence and condition on body mass index (BMI) to isolate the effects of height on body image outcomes. We find that taller adolescents are more likely to perceive themselves as overweight, even holding BMI constant, and are less likely to underestimate their weight category. However, the direction of misclassification diverges by gender: taller boys are more likely to correctly assess their weight category, while taller girls are more likely to overestimate it. These perception shifts translate into behavioral responses for girls but not for boys. A one-inch increase in height raises the probability that a girl reports wanting to lose weight by 3.0 percentage points (6.2 percent), with effects concentrated among girls in the normal weight range. Taken together, these findings establish height as a salient determinant of body image in adolescence, operating independently of body mass.
35293.zh_abstract: 本文估计了身高对青少年身体形象的因果影响，包括对体重的自我认知、这种认知的准确性以及体重管理愿望。利用1997年全国青年纵向调查（NLSY97）的数据，我们利用青春期身高的个体内变异，并以身体质量指数（BMI）为条件，来分离身高对身体形象结果的影响。我们发现，即使控制BMI不变，较高的青少年更可能认为自己超重，并且不太可能低估自己的体重类别。然而，错误分类的方向因性别而异：较高的男孩更可能正确评估自己的体重类别，而较高的女孩更可能高估它。这些认知转变转化为女孩的行为反应，但对男孩则不然。身高每增加一英寸，女孩报告想要减肥的概率提高3.0个百分点（6.2%），这种影响集中在正常体重范围内的女孩中。综合来看，这些发现确立了身高是青春期身体形象的一个显著决定因素，其作用独立于身体质量。

35291.title: Incentives, Evidence, and Reminders for Bureaucrats: Overcoming Barriers to Policy Scale Up
35291.zh_title: 激励、证据与提醒：克服政策推广中的官僚障碍
35291.authors: Patrick Agte, Daniel R. Morales, Christopher Neilson, Sebastián Otero, Gautam Rao
35291.abstract: Scaling up effective policies often requires the attention of frontline bureaucrats with many competing responsibilities. Even when policymakers adopt effective programs, implementation may not follow. In a nationwide experiment in the Dominican Republic, we test interventions to increase school principals' implementation of an educational program proven effective in a previous RCT. Only 37% of control schools verifiably implemented the intervention when ordered to by the Ministry of Education, compared with 83% in the original trial. Implementation was no higher among schools that previously implemented the program in the RCT, suggesting that fixed costs of adoption do not explain non-adoption. We find precise null effects of sharing research evidence, providing modest financial incentives, or offering implementation assistance to principals. In contrast, additional reminder calls increased implementation by 20 percentage points. A second experiment targeting a different mandated program yields the same pattern: reminders produce large effects, while monitoring messages have smaller effects. Our findings point to limited attention among bureaucrats as an important barrier to scaling policies.
35291.zh_abstract: 推广有效政策通常需要一线官僚的关注，而他们往往身兼多项相互竞争的职责。即使政策制定者采纳了有效的项目，执行也可能无法跟进。在多米尼加共和国的一项全国性实验中，我们测试了旨在提高校长实施一项先前随机对照试验中证明有效的教育项目的干预措施。当教育部下令实施时，只有37%的对照学校可验证地实施了该干预措施，而原始试验中这一比例为83%。在先前随机对照试验中实施过该项目的学校，其实施率并未更高，这表明采纳的固定成本并不能解释不采纳现象。我们发现，向校长分享研究证据、提供适度财务激励或提供实施援助均产生精确的零效应。相比之下，额外的提醒电话使实施率提高了20个百分点。针对另一项不同强制项目的第二次实验得出了相同模式：提醒产生显著效果，而监控信息的效果较小。我们的研究结果表明，官僚的有限注意力是政策推广的一个重要障碍。
35291.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, POL；JEL：D9, O1, O15, O20

35290.title: What Investment Data Implies about the AI Transition
35290.zh_title: 投资数据揭示的人工智能转型
35290.abstract: The five largest U.S. technology firms spent $\$380$ billion on capital expenditure in 2025 and are forecast to spend roughly double that in 2026. These firms risk bankruptcy unless expected profits grow commensurately. We embed this observation in a two-sector open-economy model with rare productivity booms. We calibrate the boom size to match the observed increase in investment projected through 2027, implying that a boom raises AI-sector productivity by a factor of roughly 2.7. We then calibrate a two-year window of a 50% annual probability of an increase of the same magnitude, generating a range of scenarios consistent with the wide variety of industry forecasts, along with an elevated permanent probability tied to the valuation of the aggregate market. The implied additional cumulative GDP growth ranges from 5 to 58 percentage points by 2030, with AI shares of the economy ranging from 8% to 39%. Long-term annual growth is in expectation approximately 7% but with substantial risk. With risk aversion of 3, and an elasticity of intertemporal substitution equal to 1, the risk-free rate increases by approximately half a percentage point, and the equity premium rises by approximately 3 percentage points.
35290.zh_abstract: 美国五大科技公司在2025年的资本支出为3800亿美元，预计到2026年将翻倍。除非预期利润同步增长，否则这些公司面临破产风险。我们将这一观察嵌入一个包含罕见生产率繁荣的两部门开放经济模型中。我们校准繁荣规模以匹配截至2027年预测的观察到的投资增长，这意味着繁荣使人工智能部门的生产率提高约2.7倍。然后，我们校准一个两年窗口期，其中每年有50%的概率出现相同幅度的增长，从而生成一系列与各种行业预测相符的情景，同时与整体市场估值相关的永久性概率上升。到2030年，隐含的额外累计GDP增长范围为5至58个百分点，人工智能在经济中的份额从8%到39%不等。长期年增长率预期约为7%，但存在显著风险。在风险厌恶系数为3、跨期替代弹性为1的情况下，无风险利率上升约0.5个百分点，股权溢价上升约3个百分点。
